Although he does get very excited on walks & pulls a bit to sniff all the smells, & play with all the dogs (usually he can walk past with some peaked interest, but sometimes he does get real excited and itches to play with a very light whine and jump - were working on his focus & distractions with treats + positive reinforcement when he looks up at us or checks in) with some consistent training & socialization I'm certain he'd keep his attention at bay in no time! Despite his happy go lucky spirit, Disco also knows how to chill at home. He's easy to get in his crate, will sleep next to you for hours during a mellow day, and overall just loves laying down close to people. He's just about 50lbs and shouldn't grow much more, so he's perfect to take in the car (his car manners are perfect) and on adventures! Disco would be a wonderful fit for an active home willing to dedicate some time towards cuddles, tug-of-war, + a little bit of discipline & consistency!

name: Homer
description_html:
Bringing in a Homer

Homer had one down season, arriving stray and in depleted condition. He went to a foster home to get rested, reconditioned and recharged. He's enjoying the company of his foster family and their dog as a great house guest. He's house trained, crate trained, loves walks, and especially loves a roll in the grass, and playing with the resident dog.

He's caught up all his health goals and now he's ready to put down many new chapters in his life's play book.

Bringing in a Homer isn't difficult,, he's an easy fit for many homes.

His adopter will have the comfort of having all of his health records showing he's a healthy dog, as well as adopter support perks provided by his advocates at ClassicCaninesATX.


Reach out on his link to meet him.

name: Kalamazoo
description_html:
Kalamazoo is ready to charm his way into your heart. His most distinguishing feature? Those absolutely iconic ears that give him a truly unique and lovable look!

More than just looks, Kalamazoo is a sweetheart through and through. This dog-social youngster loves to cuddle and is incredibly affectionate, soaking up every pet you can offer. He's a dream on walks—easy on a leash—and housetrained. His favorite pastimes include splashing in a kiddie pool and playing, especially tug of war with a rope. If you're looking for a sweet, ready-to-love companion, Kalamazoo is available and waiting to be yours!

name: Eli
description_html:
(5/5/2026 update) Eli! What a special boy. He is as “plug and play” and “move in ready” as a pup could ever be. He is 11 months old and can have some puppy exuberance, but he is very social with both people and dogs, he has no reactivity, and he can be taken anywhere. He is easy to exercise and when he gets enough exercise he is genuinely the perfectly behaved dog. When I picked him up from the jail program one week ago he was very timid about getting in the car and needed to be picked up and put in. He now confidently gets in and out of the car with grace whenever asked. He is house trained, knows his name, is very good with “sit” and “down”, and sleeps in his crate.


Eli is one of the lucky dogs who participated in our new program Enduring Service! This program pairs a shelter dog with inmates at the Travis State Jail to complete a 12-week basic training course. Upon graduation, he received a course certificate of completion and a goodie bag to go home with his adoptive family (hopefully soon!)


Eli is not currently onsite at the shelter but to learn more about him and how to adopt, select the “Get Started” button to hear from his current foster.


Eli is an energetic, playful pup who will thrive with an active family committed to spending time with him. He loves chasing a ball, running around, and staying engaged with his people. Eli is kennel trained for both daytime and nighttime routines, making him a great fit for a structured home. He gets along well with most other dogs and already knows several basic commands, including sit, shake (paw), and lay down. He's currently working on leash skills like heel, as well as stay and come, and is eager to keep learning. With continued guidance, playtime, and love, Eli will make a loyal and fun companion.


April 28, 2026 - I had the honor of attending the graduation of the first group of dogs from AAS to participate in the Enduring Service program at the Travis State Jail. Eli was the first of the dogs to catch my eye because of his friendly countenance and demeanor as well as his adorable freckles and spots. When I learned he was one of the few dogs that did not yet have a foster, I made the impulsive decision to bring him home to foster. I wanted his handlers to feel assured that he would not just be going back to the shelter.


This ~50lb pup is the epitome of good natured, and he is acclimating impressively well already. He had zero reactivity on the leash when we went for our first walk. And his heart-melting skill of dropping a tennis ball for himself and catching it on the rebound is too precious for words (I will try to get a video). This special guy is going to blossom in beautiful ways, and I hope he gets to put down roots in his forever home soon!

name: Bear
description_html:
Follow Bear's adventures on Instagram: @adopt_bestboybear


Are you looking for a roommate who will never judge your Netflix choices, always wants to be in the same room as you, and weighs exactly 60lbs of pure, unadulterated sweetness? Look no further! This big, goofy guy is a "young puppy" in a big boy body, and he’s officially accepting applications for a permanent snuggle partner.


The "Pro" List:

  • Professional Cuddler: He has a PhD in Snuggling. If there is a gap on the couch, he will fill it. If you are standing in the kitchen, he is your shadow. Need a new spooning partner, just tell him little or big.
  • Walking Prodigy: He’s a total gentleman on the leash. No pulling, no drama—just a happy boy enjoying the fresh air.
  • Will Work for Snacks: He is highly food-motivated. Want him to learn a new trick? Just show him a piece of cheese and watch the magic happen. He’s already got an impressive repertoire!
  • Low-Maintenance Vibe: When the snacks are gone and the walk is over, he is the king of "chill." Give him a soft bed and a stuffy toy, and he’s a happy camper.


His "Personal Requests"

Every king has a few requirements for his castle:

  • The "No Shared Walls" Clause: He’s got a bit of FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out). He might whine or bark if he’s locked out of the fun (or missing his person), so he’s looking for a house rather than an apartment. Neighbors, am I right? He'd just prefer his people be around more than not.
  • The Inner Circle: He likes other dogs, but he’s a "slow and steady" kind of guy. He loves chill roommates or small dogs who respect his personal bubble. He’s not a fan of "in-your-face" energy right away, but he’s a sweetheart once he knows you’re cool.
  • Human Entourage: New people can be a little spooky! He’s cautious about being petted by strangers, but he’s getting braver every day. He needs a patient human who understands "the shy guy life" and is ready to keep building his confidence with treats and love. He is able to be in crowds and thinks everyone is there to give him treats, he just gets a little scared when the unknown big scary hands start to go for his immensely petable face.
  • Child & Cat-Free Zone: He finds small humans a bit overwhelming and cats... well, cats are a mystery he’s not ready to solve. He’d prefer an adult-only home where he can be the star of the show.


The Bottom Line

If you have a house with a yard, a pocket full of treats, and a heart for a sensitive soul, you won’t find a more loyal companion. He’s a big, sweet, stuffy-loving boy who just wants to be wherever you are.


@adopt_bestboybear

name: Teddy
description_html:
Teddy is a handsome, 40-pound Catahoula mix with a striking dark brown patterned coat and warm amber eyes that will steal your heart. At under two years old, he’s the perfect blend of playful energy and calm affection.

This sweet boy loves to be wherever you are. He will curl up with you on the couch, hang out around the house, or join you on a walk. He enjoys running around the yard and plays wonderfully with his foster dog sibling. Teddy already knows how to sit and is working on lay/stay. He is eager to please (especially if treats are involved!).

Teddy’s favorite thing in the world is being close to his people. If you’re looking for a loyal companion who will shower you with love, follow you from room to room, and make every day brighter, Teddy is your guy!

name: Smokie
description_html:
Smokie is as handsome as he is well mannered. He originally came from a breeder and lived with a family (including 4 kiddos) for almost 2 years. When the family moved out of state, he was kept in a friend’s shed until the shelter would take him in.


We’ve learned many things about this very good boy since coming under our care. Besides being house trained and knowing basic commands, he’s also good in the car, leash trained, and is up for any adventure. We’ve had a few field trips with Smokie to the Mueller area. He’s calm and confident and always says thank you for field trips by giving us cuddles.


If you’re looking for a confident and handsome adventure buddy, he’s your boy!

name: Loki
description_html:
Loki is a very cute fun puppy. He has some energy and isn't burning it at the shelter, but is delightful in the play yard. He loves chasing toys and getting his zoomies out. He can be a little more excited on leash, but it's nothing crazy. Just toss a toy in front to keep him moving as he learns leash life. He does better after he can burn off his puppiness and will do great in a home that can help him decompress.


Interested in Loki? Reach out to his friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Wrigley
description_html:
Wrigley is the kind of dog who’s impossible not to adore. He’s gentle, sweet, and full of wiggly charm. The moment he steps outside, he happily nudges his head between your legs for pets and affection. He starts his walks with some excitement (he’s just so thrilled to be out!), but quickly settles into a loose-leash stroll and checks in often. Volunteers describe him as an easy, loving companion who’s just happy to be by your side.


Wrigley does well with most dogs who share his soft, gentle play style. He also thrives in a home setting, where he shows off his goofy, playful side. Though he isn’t especially treat-motivated, his eagerness to connect with people makes him a joy to work with. He does have a high prey drive, so he’ll need supervision when wildlife is around and may be best suited to a home without cats or other small animals.

name: Abner
description_html:
Abner is a handsome and sweet dog who is ready to steal your heart! This stunning boy has a truly unforgettable look, thanks to his striking eyes—one bright blue and one warm brown. His unique gaze perfectly matches his wonderful personality. 

On a walk, Abner is a dream, demonstrating excellent manners and staying easy on the leash. When it's time to play, he's energetic and engaging, but he settles down just as quickly for some quality snuggle time. Above all, Abner is affectionate and believes there is no problem a good, long belly rub can't solve. If you're looking for a playful, loving companion with an undeniably captivating look, Abner is the perfect match!


Interested in Abner? Reach out to his friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Nova
description_html:
Nova is one of the lucky dogs participating in our new program Enduring Service! This program pairs a shelter dog with inmates at the Travis State Jail to complete a 12-week basic training course. Upon graduation, they will receive a course certificate of completion and a goodie bag to go home with their adoptive family.


Nova is not currently onsite at the shelter but to learn more about her and how to adopt, select the “Get Started” button to hear from a staff member! 


Nova is a wonderful mature dog with a loving heart and a gentle spirit. She's both fun and easy to train, making her a great companion for a variety of homes. Nova enjoys staying active, she loves to run and her favorite game is chase but she also has a calm, relaxed side and carries herself with a ladylike temperament. She's an excellent walking or jogging partner and walks politely by your side. Nova is smart, loyal, and well-trained. She has mastered basic obedience commands using both voice and hand signals, including sit, stay, down, heel, and more. She is kennel trained and comfortable resting in her crate both during the day and overnight. She even knows a few fun tricks like roll over! Nova is friendly and enjoys meeting new people and dogs. She may bark to alert you to strangers or unfamiliar situations, but she warms up with time and proper introductions. Once she feels comfortable, her sweet and affectionate personality truly shines. Nova is a loving, loyal girl who is ready to find her forever family-someone who will appreciate her intelligence, energy, and big heart.

name: Dom
description_html:
Dom is a fun, playful, and incredibly handsome boy who’s ready to find his forever home. He’s easy to harness, and once you toss a toy out of his kennel, he’s all in and ready to go! Dom can be strong at first on leash, but after he gets some energy out, he settles in nicely and relaxes.

Dom is very smart and listens well—he already knows tricks and is eager to learn more, especially when food and treats are involved (they’re his favorite!). He absolutely loves spending time playing in the yard, showing off his playful and goofy side.

With a medium energy level, Dom would be a great match for an active lifestyle, and he’ll likely relax even more once he’s out of the shelter environment. He’s leash trained, house trained, and full of personality—lovable, intelligent, and always ready for fun.


Interested in Dom? Reach out to his friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Chewy
description_html:
Between his beautiful merle coat, pointy ears, and soft brown eyes Chewy quickly became a staff/volunteer favorite! Chewy likes to meet new humans gently but is cuddly and so so wiggly with his friends. The quickest way to Chewy’s heart is toys, hotdogs, more toys, and more hotdogs!


Chewy’s great leash manners make him a perfect walking buddy and his adorable zoomies in the yard are always full of charm. Chewy’s staff friends describe him as “so dang precious” and “so sweet.”


Have a dog at home? Chewy goes to playgroup at the shelter and is labeled as a solid coexister aka a real chill guy.


Ready to add some love to your life? Chewy is certain to put a smile on your face. Visit him at Austin Animal Services today!

name: Hendrix
description_html:
Hendrix is a two-year-old heartthrob with one goal in life: to love his person with his entire soul. He’s fully house-trained, incredibly smart, and very treat-motivated (which means training with him is basically just a snack-based friendship).


His favorite “job” at the shelter is visiting the real-life rooms on campus with volunteers, where he takes his snuggling very seriously. Couch? Claimed. Lap? Claimed. Emotional support duties? Nailed it. Hendrix doesn’t just cuddle — he commits.


This boy is affectionate, gentle, and deeply people-oriented. He’s the kind of dog who looks at you like you’re his whole world… because you are. Once Hendrix picks his person, that’s it — you’ve found your soul dog.


If you’re searching for a loyal best friend, a professional snuggler, and a dog who will love you harder than you thought possible, Hendrix is ready and waiting. Email orangedotcrew@gmail.com to learn more and kickstart this heartwarming journey! For more pupdates, follow Orange Dot Crew on Facebook and Instagram.

name: Evermore
description_html:
Evermore is a very good boy who walks well on leash and will "sit" for a treat. He is housetrained and crate trained, as well. Evermore is affectionate with people and loves cuddles!


Evermore is a sweet, calm and gentle boy. He’s also one of the most housetrained dogs at the shelter. He does well meeting new people and he seems comfortable being around other dogs. He has lived with two different dogs in foster matching their vibes (one younger more playful and the other a senior professional relaxer!). Evermore has the potential to live with another medium/large dog and would require a meet and greet with the behavior team at AAS.


Evermore has done well on outings and in new environments. He takes it all in but will also sit at your feet while you enjoy a coffee in the sunshine.


Evermore loves to get out and explore, walking and sniffing like a champion. He also happily rides in the car, windows down if possible for the best sniffs!

He likes to play with toys and will play ball and with ropes toys especially. As well as being a great adventure buddy Evermore loves to relax and chill at home. A wonderful couch buddy!

name: Tigger
description_html:
Meet Tigger 💙


Tigger is one of those dogs who makes you smile the moment you meet him. Friendly, calm, and incredibly affectionate, he greets people with a loose, wiggly body, soft eyes, and a happy tail. Within minutes, he’s handing out kisses, leaning in for pets, and soaking up attention like he’s known you forever.


This sweet boy loves toys — especially soft toys and tennis balls — and will proudly bring them over to show off. In playtime rooms, he’s playful and happy, but he also knows how to relax and enjoy cuddles, belly rubs, and butt scratches. Volunteers consistently describe him as incredibly easy, well-mannered, and one of the most house-trained dogs they’ve met in the shelter.


Tigger walks beautifully on leash and is very responsive to direction and cues. He knows how to sit, is treat-motivated, and does well transitioning in and out of his kennel. While he may show mild excitement when he sees other dogs, it’s friendly curiosity — he’s non-reactive passing kennels and even stops to give sweet greetings through the gate, complete with wiggly tails and nose kisses.


He enjoys sniffing around, spending time with people, and would thrive in a home that offers love, routine, and maybe a few good toys to toss around. A house with a yard would be wonderful, but Tigger could also do well in an apartment with regular walks and enrichment.


Tigger is a laid-back cuddler with a playful side — a truly special dog who’s ready to be someone’s best friend.


💫 Good on leash

💫 House-trained

💫 Affectionate & cuddly

💫 Toy-loving

💫 Easy, gentle companion


If you’re looking for a sweet, loving dog who will adore you back tenfold, Tigger might just be your guy. 🐾💙

name: Canela
description_html: Canela has such a wonderful personality and is such a sweet girl. She’s playful and loves fetch with her stuffies (she’s pretty good at dropping them for you to toss too!). She also loves playing in the little puppy pools, and splashing around in them. She’s also very house trained! Once she works out her zoomies, she’s super easy on a leash. She’s a super cuddly young pup, and loves to lean against her human for pets and scratches.

name: Candy Corn
description_html:
Candy Corn is not your average dog! This handsome boy stands out with his incredibly unique eyes and coat—a striking brindle pattern set against an orange hue, earning him his sweet and tasty name.

He is a delightful companion who brings joy wherever he goes with his infectious smile.. Candy Corn is very housetrained and leash-trained, making him a breeze to live with. As a true Lab, he adores food and treats (which makes further training fun!).

He’s ready for fun with his favorite activity being fetch, which he’ll happily play until you tire out. Candy Corn is a playful, loving, and unique pup ready to shower his forever family with affection!


Interested in Candy Corn? reach out to his friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Marcelle
description_html:
Marcelle is an active, independent guy who will happily entertain himself with his favorite toys. He loves to run and play and is always ready for a dip in the pool to cool off. Marcelle also enjoys playing with a well matched dog friend!


When it comes to human friends, Marcelle is a sensitive soul and might be a bit shy at first; he just needs a little time to become confident that you’re a friend. But once he does, you’ll have a really special bond with this guy. Marcelle’s ultimate person would be someone who enjoys an active lifestyle, appreciates an independent guy, and is willing to go at his pace as they build their forever bond. 


Interested in Marcelle? Reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Mojo
description_html:
Meet Mojo — the ultimate cuddle bug with a heart of gold

Mojo’s love languages are absolutely physical touch and quality time. He’ll accept gifts if you insist, but what he truly wants is to be as close to his human as possible. From the moment you meet him, his gentle, affectionate nature shines. This boy is all about closeness, connection, and soaking up every bit of love he can get.


Mojo is a dream on leash, checks in often with his walker, and already knows cues like sit and shake. He’s polite, well-mannered, and radiates “I want to be your best friend” energy. He also keeps his kennel impressively tidy, suggesting he may be house trained. Passing people and dogs? No problem for this calm, steady guy—he simply minds his manners and keeps moving.


If you’re looking for an affectionate, easygoing companion who loves deeply and loyally, Mojo is your match. Come see why everyone falls for this handsome lovebug.

name: Mesquite
description_html:
Sweet Mesquite is a shy young kitty who is slowly but surely learning how kind people can be. He purrs easily with some chin and head scritches, and he is very excited about meals. His favorite hobby is playing with toys with other cats. In fact, he hasn’t yet met a cat whom he doesn’t like, and he would be happiest in a home with at least one playful feline buddy.


He wants to be in the same room as you, but he won’t get in your lap or bother you while you’re working. He is content with a few head scratches whenever you happen to pass by him. He also likes to sleep at the foot of the bed, but he doesn’t want to be on top of you. At most, he might drape himself over an ankle or snuggle up to a foot.


Mesquite is a bit of a worrywart and he's a little skittish about people moving around him. It may take him a little longer than usual to adapt to a new home, but with a little patience and maybe a few treats and play sessions, he will warm up and be a quiet, sweet addition to your family.

name: Ash
description_html:
Hi there! I’m Ash, a bundle of joy packed with curiosity and energy.


Every day is a new adventure for me, and I love exploring every nook and cranny of my surroundings. I’m also quite the brainy pup, always eager to learn new tricks and solve puzzles. My friends here say

I’m sweet and always sporting a smile, which makes every day brighter. I dream of a home where I can share all this love and excitement. I'm also house trained!


If you’re looking for a loyal friend to add zest to your life, I’m your guy!


Interested in Ash? Reach out to his friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Lopez
description_html:
Lopez might seem shy at first, but he’s a total sweetheart who’s ready to be someone’s best friend. He’s potty trained, very anffectionate and loves being close to his people. If you’re looking for a dog who enjoys gentle companionship and plenty of love, Lopez is your guy.

For walks, just grab a harness and Lopez is a breeze — he’s easy to walk and happy to stroll by your side, making him a great match for both relaxed outings and daily routines.

Lopez would do wonderfully in a home that values cuddles, a sweet shy pup, and a loyal companion. Come meet him —t it won’t take long to see how special he is

name: Ink
description_html: Ink is a happy-go-lucky guy who’s always up for whatever adventure you have in mind - especially if it involves toys! Ink LOVES a toy and will get so excited he will jog around with it happily, plop in your lap to show you, and then jog around with it again. Despite his enthusiasm, Ink is surprisingly easy to handle — volunteers found him simple to harness and eager to head out for fun. Once in the play yard, Ink is in his element: zooming around, chasing toys, and soaking up every moment. Outside the play yard, Ink is also a great jogging buddy in the making and happily kept pace on a short jog with one of his volunteer friends. He knows sit, likes treats, and is a smart boy who will be easy to train and be up for any adventure with his new people!

name: Chiquis
description_html:
If you’re looking for a dog who can make you laugh every single day, meet Chiquis — a tiny powerhouse with a HUGE zest for life. Volunteers describe her as a “busy lady” who would rather zoom, hop, and play than sit still for a photo. She loves toys, loves movement, and loves turning the play yard into her personal racetrack.


Chiquis has classic puppy-style enthusiasm: she can be a little jumpy when excited, but she responds well to redirection and absolutely thrives when given something fun to do. She’s sweet, playful, and people-oriented, and once she burns off a little energy, her softer side starts peeking through.


Because she’s new to the shelter, we’re still learning all her quirks — but what we know so far is that she’s spirited, silly, and ready for an adopter who appreciates a high-energy, toy-driven companion.


Chiquis would love a home with:

✔ Playtime, toys, and activities

✔ Positive training to help channel her enthusiasm

✔ Someone who appreciates an energetic, goofy pup


If you’re searching for a pocket-sized adventure buddy who brings joy everywhere she goes, come meet Chiquis — she’s ready to run right into her new life.

Interested in Chiquis? Reach out to blueplusbusters@gmail.com for more info!

name: Boski
description_html:
Boski is a treat-motivated sweetheart with a relaxed, easygoing presence. Volunteers describe him as sweet, a little cuddly, and pleasant to spend time with. He leashes up smoothly, heads straight out to potty (he appears very house-trained), and settles nicely into his walk after an initial bit of excited pulling.


Boski knows basic cues like sit and come, checks in with his handler, and shows a gentle, cooperative demeanor. He strikes a nice balance between playful and laid-back, making him easy to imagine in a variety of home settings, including apartments.


Interested in Boski? Reach out to his friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Ginger
description_html:
Ginger is a smart, curious pup. She is super focused on you or cheese or that sound coming from over there. She's housetrained and treat-motivated, making her training a joy, knowing basic commands like "sit." She's a great passenger in the car, and easy around the house, happy to gaze out the window or just be close to her humans.

Ginger enjoys exploring, hiking, a good sniff, and puzzle games with treats involved. She'll also do zoomies and is soooo happy to run around the yard and stretch her legs. She loves her humans and gives the most gentle, sweet little kisses.

She's really fun and full of energy. Come meet her today!

name: Falcor
description_html:
Falcor is a big, gorgeous boy who is very friendly and gentle - no stranger danger! He was surrendered to AAC with a urethral obstruction, and made a full recovery from surgery that removed the narrowest part of his urethra. He has easily transitioned to an anti-inflammatory diet to reduce and help prevent bladder inflammation going forward. 

Falcor is agile and playful, and will fetch toy mice. His meows are tiny, and he will gently raise his front paws onto your legs when he wants attention.

Falcor will do best in a household as an only pet or where his access to food is separate from other pets. He would be a GREAT family pet, but beware, you are liable to get lost in his crystal blue eyes!

Visit Falcor on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/falcor_blue?igsh=N3M4dHBjOWN1ejdz

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Falcor and all Desperate Housecats!

name: Angel
description_html:
~ Ears Up!

Angel is a sweet, easygoing girl who's turning a new page after her beloved owner who went into hospice. She's a total sweetheart who gets along with everyone and is super low-maintenance. Angel loves playing with her ball and pretending to lightly hide it outdoors, sunbathing indoors and outdoors, and going for sniff walks. She's perfectly content to relax inside and watch the world go by from a window view. She's house-trained, trustworthy, independent, and doesn't bother the local wildlife. If you're looking for a loving companion who will bring joy and peace to your life, without bringing a lot of new chores and routines, Angel is your girl!

Reach out on her link or contact her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Mama Eden
description_html:
Mama is an affectionate, high energy girl who wants to soak up all life has to offer. Her favorite things are walks, hikes, playing with her foster brother, and snuggling up for long naps. She has the cutest, most expressive eyes that will truly convey all the love she has for her people. 



Extra info: She would do best in a home with an active lifestyle. She requires A LOT of walks and/or play. She’s a big love bug that is still learning her size, so I don’t think a home with small children would be a good fit.

name: Figgy Puddin'
description_html: Figgy Puddin is an absolute charmer! He's easy for walks and loves to get his wiggles out in a play yard. Figgy has a gentle curiosity for other dogs and people that he sees on his outings. Once play time is over, he's happy to just hang out and watch the world while getting cuddles from his friends. This affectionate and easy going guy is the perfect catch!

name: Miles
description_html: Miles is an absolute sweetheart who will melt your heart the moment you meet him. He has puppy-like charm! On leash, Miles is a dream with his easy walk style and rarely pulls, preferring to take his time and thoughtfully sniff his surroundings. In the play yard, his playful side shines! Miles loves a good game of fetch and is so polite about it, happily dropping the toy right at your feet. If you don’t notice, he’ll adorably nudge it closer, pick it up, and place it right into your hand. Watching him run around with his bouncy little hops is guaranteed to make you smile. Indoors, Miles settles beautifully exploring a bit before relaxing with a toy, showing how well he can switch from playtime to cuddle time. Miles is a fantastic companion to those looking for a sweet, playful pup to bring joy, laughs, and a lot of love into the home.

name: Lady
description_html:
Lady is a sweet, affectionate, and goofy girl who absolutely adores people. She loves being part of whatever her humans are doing and quickly forms strong bonds with the people in her life. She has a playful side too... tug, shaking toys, and zooming around the yard are some of her favorite activities. She’s also a smart pup who enjoys learning and staying busy with enrichment games like puzzle toys, scent games, and sniffy walks.


Lady is also a sensitive dog who is still building confidence with a couple things. She can feel unsure around other dogs and would likely do best as the only pet in the home. She prefers not to be left alone for long periods and is currently working on learning that being home alone is safe and relaxing. With patience, routine, and continued training, she’s sure to make steady progress.


What Lady does best is loving her people. She thrives with human connection and would be happiest in a home where she can spend lots of time with her person and continue building confidence at her own pace.


If you’re looking for a devoted companion who will bond closely with you and bring lots of personality into your life, Lady might be the perfect match.

name: K’jay
description_html: K'Jay had to be surrendered due to their owner's health issues. This big boy is a cuddler who loves praise! Tell him what a good boy he is and he will be happy the whole day about it. This friendly boy will gladly sit in your lap or lean in to be closer to you. He is one of the most house trained dogs at the shelter. He is big and beautiful. He is a very good boy, who is making lots of human friends amongst the volunteers. He is being very brave, after losing his home and family. He is like a big polar bear that you just want to hug. He's still working on his leash manners and doesn't always realize his own size or strength but he responds well to gentle coaxing. K'Jay is a young, smart guy who is eager to please and loves learning! He so deserves to be running and playing for hours, as he is a young dog.

name: Rudolph
description_html:
This sweet, floppy-eared pup is as cute as his name suggests. Rudolph is a young, energetic bundle of joy who loves nothing more than playtime and cuddles. Whether he's chasing after a tennis ball or curling up beside you for snuggles, he does everything with a big, happy heart.

Rudolph is a fetch champion in the making and absolutely lights up when he sees a toy. He’s also a dream on walks—no pulling, no zig-zagging—just a gentle little trot from a very good boy who loves exploring the world by your side.

Playful, affectionate, and endlessly cheerful, Rudolph is ready to bring joy to a lucky family. If you’re looking for a sweet companion who’ll keep you smiling and your heart full, come meet this happy fella today!


email blueplusbusters@gmail.com for more info!

name: Hannah
description_html:
Hannah is a sweet, loving pup with a spirit as big as her smile.


She’s bursting with excitement at the thought of finding her forever person—someone to take on life by her side. Hannah loves a good walk, where she can follow her nose, soak in her surroundings, and enjoy the adventure. Along the way, she’ll look to you for reassurance, gaining confidence from your presence.


But exploring isn’t all Hannah is dreaming of. At heart, she’s simply searching for someone who makes her feel safe and secure—whether that means discovering the world together or curling up on the couch. In return, she’ll shower you with affection and plenty of enthusiastic face kisses.


Come meet your future best friend, Hannah, at AAS today and see why our volunteers are so excited to watch her shine in a home of her very own.


Interested in Hannah? Reach out to her friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Edmond
description_html:
Eddie’s past is a little mysterious, but these days he’s fully embracing the good life indoors. After a scary stint in the shelter, he quickly showed that with the right family, he’s an incredibly loving and loyal companion.

Eddie is a sensitive, smart boy who bonds deeply - especially with women - and his affectionate, goofy personality really shines once he feels safe. He loves showing off his belly and has no problem asking for pets, cuddles, and attention. He claimed his spot in our bed night #1 and is our little shadow around the house.

He gains a ton of confidence from other dogs and would thrive in a home with a friendly, confident canine pal to show him the ropes. He’s house trained, great on leash, learning commands, highly treat motivated, loves playing with all kinds of toys, and would make a great walking or jogging buddy. He's still learning how to dog, but he's catching on very quickly. Eddie may be shy at first, but give him a little time and you’ll get a devoted best friend.

name: Cheddar
description_html:
Cheddar is a sweet and playful girl whose gentle demeanor will fill your heart with joy.

She is great in the car and will sit calmly for the whole ride, leaning her head on you for reassuring pets.

She has happily shared her kennel with other dog friends, but after meeting a cat at a volunteer’s house, she did not seem comfortable around them. Come meet this sweet pup at the shelter—you won’t regret making her part of your family.

name: Onyx
description_html:
Meet Onyx! 🖤🐾


Onyx is a sweet, playful girl who loves to cuddle and enjoys spending time with other dogs. She’s affectionate, social, and happiest when she has toys to play with and a cozy spot to snuggle into.


If you’re looking for a loving companion with gentle hearts and a fun side, Onyx could be your perfect match.

name: Ramon
description_html:
Ramon is a golden-hearted pup who’s ready to be your new best friend! With his radiant cream-colored coat and a smile that lights up, Ramon is the perfect blend of athletic energy and gentle companionship.

Ramon has a playful spirit; he’s always up for toy time or a backyard romp. He is also a total gentleman when it’s time to hit the pavement; Ramon walks great on a leash, making every morning stroll a joy.

Above all, Ramon is defined by his sweet, affectionate nature. Whether he’s giving soft nudges for head scratches or wagging his tail in greeting, his goal is simple: to love and be loved. If you’re looking for a loyal, well-mannered partner for life’s adventures, Ramon is your guy!

name: Lil Baby Lou
description_html:
Yes, he’s 95 pounds.


Yes, his name is Lil Baby Lou.

And yes… he is absolutely, unquestionably a baby.


Lou is a dog built like a linebacker but powered entirely by love, snuggles, and the belief that he was meant to be a lap dog. Don’t let the size fool you—this big boy’s favorite activities include cuddling, being near his people, and giving hugs. His heart is as soft as a marshmallow. 


Lil Baby Lou is extremely house trained (a true gentleman), rides like a champ in the car, and is always down for a good toy session. Toss him a toy and you’ll see his playful, goofy side shine—then he’ll happily settle in for some quality couch time. If you’ve ever wanted a giant teddy bear who thinks he’s a baby and has total soul dog potential, Lou is your guy. 


Come meet Lil Baby Lou—he promises to take up space in your home, on your couch, and most importantly, in your heart. Email orangedotcrew@gmail.com to learn more and kickstart this heartwarming journey. For more delightful updates, follow Orange Dot Crew on Facebook and Instagram.

name: Caleb
description_html:
Meet Caleb! 

Caleb is a sweet, happy guy with a great smile and a big love for fetch. He walks nicely on leash, is easy to take out, and once he’s handled his business he’s all about playtime—especially if there’s a ball involved!

He had a blast playing in the yard and enjoying toys in the Real Life Room, even showing off an adorable full sploot on the couch. Caleb loves fetch so much he prefers to keep the ball unless he spots another one ready to go—then the game is on again.

Playful, friendly, and easy to spend time with, Caleb is a wonderful buddy ready for a home that will keep the games coming.

name: Oracle
description_html:
You can tell that Oracle is missing his person. :( 


Oracle lost his home after his owner’s house burned down, and now he is hoping for a fresh start with someone who will love him as much as his person did. He is a super house-trained boy who keeps his circle a little on the smaller side, but once you are in, you are in.


Oracle is sweet, silly, playful, and so much fun to spend time with. He loves his friends, loves treats, and already knows some cute tricks like sit, come, and shake. He has an playful side, but he is also the kind of dog who bonds deeply and loves being with his person.


He would do best with people who appreciate that he likes to keep his circle small and facilitates proper intros with new people. For the people he knows and trusts, Oracle is incredibly loving, fun, and rewarding. He is ready for a home where he can feel secure again and get back to doing what he does best- being a loyal, goofy, sweet companion.

name: Misty
description_html:
Misty is an absolute sweetheart who steals hearts the moment you meet her. This precious girl is a true cuddle bug who loves to snuggle, walks nicely on leash, and is house trained—basically a dream companion.


She loves playing with toys in the play yard. She can even entertain herself with her favorite toys, making her a lovely mix of gentle and playful.


If you’re looking for a sweet, affectionate pup who will happily curl up by your side, Misty might just be the one.


From foster: We LOVE fostering Misty! She is a happy girl, and her tail is always wagging. She is easy to manage and completely house-trained. She walks calmly by other dogs on the leash and does not care about the squirrels or cats in the neighborhood. Give this girl a chance, and you'll fall in love!

name: Legacy
description_html:
She’s all wrinkles and personality!✨


Introducing Legacy, a charismatic volunteer favorite looking for her forever.💕 One of her volunteer friends described her as “pure serotonin” in dog form.


Legacy has a joy that shines through even on the cloudiest days. Her playful spirit, adorable face wrinkles, and appreciation for the simple things (like romping through the tall grass) makes her a stand out.


She goes to doggy play group and has lived with a dog sibling before. 🐶She enjoys splashing in the pool and playing fetch. She’s also a smarty pants; She knows “sit” and is working on perfecting her “down.”


Interested in Legacy? Reach out to her friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Crosby
description_html: Crosby is terrified in the shelter. This shy boy was abandoned so we understand his difficulty trusting us so soon in his stay at the shelter. But, we'd really love for him to have a true friend, the one he deserves in a home, and we suspect he will be a loyal companion to whoever offers him their friendship. If not adopted soon, we'd love to see Crosby in foster care where he can relax and come out of his shell gradually. He will do best in a low traffic, quiet spot with someone who can provide consistent, gentle attempts at interaction while also giving him the space he requests to adapt.

name: Pooh
description_html: Pooh is a happy, playful boy. He is housetrained, walks nicely on leash with a harness, and is dog friendly. Pooh loves to romp around the play yard tossing around toys and chasing balls. He also enjoys running along the fence line with other friendly dogs. Pooh is sweet, affectionate and ready for his forever home. Come meet this handsome fellow!

name: Vic
description_html:
Vic is a Cactus Cat learning to trust people more! Cactus Cats are shy but usually really love cat companions and do well in homes with other cats. Vic will need a calm place where he can continue his nose-boop training (a confidence building exercise that helps kitties build relationships with people). Luckily this boy loves Churu, so this is an easy reward for his hard work. He enjoys pets, you just have to go slowly and reward his bravery with his favorite treat!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Vic and ALL Cactus Cats/Desperate Housecats!

name: Princess Peach
description_html: Meet Princess Peach! She really wants you because she loves new friends. This girl enjoys walks, play time and cuddling with her friends, and if you give her a toy to carry around it will truly make her day! Princess Peach is housetrained and crate trained. She's ready to take on the world with a toy in her mouth and a friend by her side, so say "hello" to this girl today!

name: Elf
description_html:
Elf is ready to be your sidekick best friend for adventures around Austin. This handsome, 1-year-old brindle pup is a 50-pound bundle of joy and athletic energy.

Elf is the ultimate fun-sized pup. He’s the perfect age—past the puppy stage, but still full of youthful curiosity, playfulness, and treat-motivated for trainability. Whether it’s playing fetch, chasing toys, going for a hike, or investigating the sights and sounds of the neighborhood, Elf is ready to jump in with tail-wagging enthusiasm.

With his striking coat and soulful eyes, Elf is as charming as he is active. He’s looking for an upbeat home that matches his zest for life and love for the outdoors.

Interested in Elf? Reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Princess
description_html:
🐾 Meet Princess!

Princess is a petite little lovebug with a big heart and an even bigger personality. She’s the perfect in-between size — not too big, not too small — just right for cuddles on the couch and adventures around the neighborhood.

This sweet girl is very house-trained and would make an easy addition to a home. Princess is also a wonderful doggie friend who absolutely loves being around her buddies. She gets so excited to see them and is always ready to share tail wags and good vibes.

On walks, Princess enjoys exploring but is also great about checking in often, making her a fun and connected walking companion. And when she’s got a little extra joy to share, she’ll treat you to her favorite activity: happy zoomies in the yard!

Princess has so much love to give and is patiently waiting for a family of her very own. She would be thrilled to trade shelter life for a cozy home, a comfy bed, and someone to call her best friend.

Come meet Princess — she’s ready to be your little ray of sunshine! 🐶💛

name: Bear
description_html:
Bear lost his home after a fire and is now looking for a fresh start with someone who will see just how special he is.


He is house trained, treat motivated, and already knows commands like sit, stay, come, and shake. In the shelter, Bear has shown himself to be a calm, curious boy who enjoys walks, checks in with his person, and starts to relax once he is out of the kennel and given a little time. 


Bear is the kind of dog who makes an impression quickly. Volunteers describe him as a sweetheart, a happy boy, and a favorite amongst volunteers. He loves affection from his friends, enjoys romping around a yard, and has the kind of fun, lovable energy that makes people excited to spend more time with him. His former owner described him as super loving and very quiet, the kind of dog who likes to stay close to his person. 


Like a lot of dogs going through a huge life change, Bear can be a little sensitive in new situations and may need some time to settle in and build trust. But once he has space to decompress, his sweet and playful side really starts to come through. He is looking for a home that will give him that chance and let him get back to being someone’s loyal, fun companion.

name: Puma
description_html:
Puma will melt your heart with his crystal blue eye! He is a sweet pup whose bouncy gate will keep you smiling the entire walk. Very house trained and fabulous on a leash, he takes his cues from his guiding human and is definitely down for a cuddle session between activities.


Come meet this little house cow today

name: Kugel
description_html:
Kugel is all heart. He’s affectionate, loves to curl up close, and never misses a chance to give gentle kisses. If you’re looking for a dog who makes you feel loved every single day, he’s your guy.


Kugel has great leash manners and enjoys getting out for walks, exploring, and spending time with his people. He’s eager to please and responds well to guidance.


He’s also done well with other dogs and could go home with a well‑matched playmate who appreciates his friendly, playful energy.


If you’re ready for a loyal companion with a big heart and an even bigger cuddle quota, Kugel can’t wait to meet you.


If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com

name: Hana Bear
description_html:
Meet Hana Bear — a happy, affectionate girl who’s ready to bring joy, fun, and plenty of cuddles into your life.

Hana Bear is a sweet and friendly pup who walks nicely on leash and appears to be house trained, making her a great companion both at home and out on adventures. She loves spending time outdoors, whether she’s sniffing around, romping in the play yard, chasing balls, or playing with her favorite toys. If you’re looking for a running partner, Hana Bear would be thrilled to join you — she loves to stay active!

She’s also a social butterfly with other dogs. Hana Bear enjoys running along the fence line with canine friends and could potentially go home with a well matched dog friend.

Beyond her playful side, Hana Bear is incredibly sweet and cuddly. She enjoys affection and has a warm, loving personality that makes her both entertaining and comforting to be around.

Hana Bear is patiently waiting to meet her forever person — someone who will take her on adventures, share cozy moments, and give her the loving home she deserves.

name: Lando
description_html:
Lando has a soft face and an even softer personality. This gentle boy has a gentle charm that makes you want to hug him right away. 

 

Lando is a cuddly sweetheart who loves being close to his people. He enjoys squeaky toys and playtime in the yard, though fetch isn't really his thing. On walks he’s usually a loose-leash walker, with the occasional excitement to hurry and sniff something interesting. 

 

Lando can be a little timid with loud noises and appreciates slow, gentle introductions. Once he’s comfortable, his loving and playful side shines. 

 

If you're looking for a cuddly best friend with a playful streak, Lando is your guy!

name: Persephone
description_html: This is a feral momma kitty who I have been working on taming in foster with her babies. She's still likely to hiss if approached too quickly and be tightened up as hard as a rock when you touch her, but with some dedication I have gotten her to start relaxing during pets and even put her chin up and press into some neck and chin scritches. Definitely can't pick her up with your hands, but placing a blanket or towel over her makes her limp enough to handle and transport her. I believe she can be domesticated and put into a good home, but it will take continued work. Named Persephone because I got two kittens from her the year before these four kittens, so she was like Persephone coming back from the underworld every year bringing me new pretty babies. She has now been spayed to end that cycle!

name: Felix
description_html:
Felix has the sweetest wide smile and shiny black coat, with leyes that sparkle when he looks up at you. This handsome boy is as cute as he is gentle. 

 

Felix is a soft, sensitive boy who loves staying close to his person. He walks beautifully on leash, checks in often, and already knows a few tricks! He has a playful side too, offering cute play bows and enjoying some bouncy fun once he warms up. His medium energy makes him a delight to spend time with, whether it’s a stroll or some relaxed hangout time. 

 

Felix can be a little bit shy at first and appreciates patience while he builds confidence.

 

If you're looking for a loyal, gentle buddy who will stick by your side, Felix is ready to meet you!


Have questions about Felix? Reach out to his friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Aiden
description_html:
First time dog owner? This perfect fella is for you!


Aiden may be one of the easiest dogs at the shelter. On leash, fantastic! A living room setting, would love a nap or to lay quietly on the couch and munch on a toy. In a play yard, can play independently with toys but will come up for some cuddles as well!


Aiden recently went on an outing to McKinney Falls State Park. On the way there he sat in one spot in the back set holding a toy while looking out the window. He did fantastic on the 3 mile hike - was easy on leash and non-reactive. On the way back to the shelter this kid laid down and slept so hard that the volunteer drove around for a while then parked for about 30 minutes just to he could get a quiet nap for the first time in over 100 days.


Aiden was also used as a dog to train new volunteers recently. He showed off his "sit" and listening skills while occasionally asking for breaks by cuddling up to our new volunteers for some love.


As a 40-ish pound dog who is extremely house trained, he would be perfect in an apartment or a home!


Aiden is also heartworm negative.

name: Zane
description_html:
Zane is an 11‑month‑old pup with a zest for life and a personality that’s all sunshine. He’s enthusiastic, happy, and delightfully silly; the kind of dog who can make you laugh without even trying. He already knows sit, walks nicely on leash, and stays non‑reactive when passing other dogs. With the right match, he could happily live with another friendly pup. Add in his love for peanut butter and frolicking in the grass, and you’ve got a goofy, lovable companion who turns every day into something brighter.



If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com.

name: Zoe
description_html:
Hello there! I’m Zoe, an adorable 11-year-old pup with a heart full of love and a spirit that’s still a bit spunky! I came into the shelter after my owner sadly passed away, and now I'm looking for my forever home.

These days, I’m living it up with two other dog friends, and I fit in just perfectly! I absolutely adore people and am always ready for my daily strolls around the neighborhood. You’ll often find me stopping to greet everyone I meet—head scratches and belly rubs are my favorite!

I’ve got a curious side, too! I love observing squirrels and cats as they scurry by, and I still enjoy a good game of chase with a ball.

I may be a senior gal, but I’m young at heart and ready to share my love with my forever family. I’m looking for a home, preferably with another dog sibling, as I truly enjoy the company of my doggie friends! If you're on the hunt for a loving companion who will bring joy and laughter to your life, I might just be the girl for you! Feel free to reach out to my foster mom - she'd be happy to share more about me.

name: Jax
description_html:
Jax is a happy-go-lucky guy with a heart full of curiosity and love. Whether it’s sniffing his way through a walk, running around a yard with a toy, or cuddling up next to his person on a couch, Jax radiates joy. 


Sometimes he might jump for joy on his human friends - he just loves them so much! But a treat and a request to “sit” help him to remember his Good Boy Manners. Jax is smart, treat motivated, and ready to learn more. Jax could live with a well matched doggie sibling, so if your pup needs a buddy, staff are available to schedule a Meet & Greet. Jax is ready for his forever home and comes with the full support of the Orange Dot Crew volunteer team who know and love him! Email orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Sandy
description_html: Sandy is a dream puppy with the perfect puppy energy, fun and joyful. She's affectionate and playful, and will sit for cheese and pets. Sandy is a sweetheart. Come meet her!

name: Josie Rosie
description_html: Meet Josie Rosie, an active tripod girl who would love to be a part of your family!

name: Ottie Pop
description_html:
Meet Ottie Pop 🍭🐾

Hi, my name is Ottie Pop, and I’m just as fun as I sound! I’m the kind of dog who brings smiles wherever I go. Whether I’m bouncing around during playtime, showing off my goofy personality, or soaking up attention from my favorite humans, I believe life is meant to be enjoyed. I've been given the name Hip Hop Ottie Pop for the way I frolick around entertaining myself or anyone around.


I’m sweet, playful, and always ready to make a new friend. I am a little shy when meeting new friends so slow introductions would be best. I could also live with another dog and ask that you set up a meet and greet with the staff so we can make sure me and the family dog are going to be besties. I’ve got a big heart and an even bigger desire to be part of a family of my very own. If you’re looking for a loyal companion who can make you laugh one minute and melt into your lap the next, I may just be your perfect match.

I love toys, treats, adventures, and quality cuddle time. I’m also pretty smart and eager to learn — especially if snacks and praise are involved. I try my best every day and would thrive with someone who will continue helping me shine.

Most of all, I’m looking for what every shelter dog dreams about:

A home where I feel safe, loved, and included.

I promise to greet you with excitement, love you with my whole heart, and remind you daily that the little things — walks, belly rubs, naps beside your favorite person — are actually the big things.

So what do you think?

Ready to make your life a whole lot sweeter with an Ottie Pop? 💕🐶

name: Remington
description_html:
Remington is a big, sweet, toy-loving guy who knows how to enjoy life.

 

He’s got that perfect balance: happy to head out for a walk, toss a toy around, and stretch his legs — and just as happy to settle in close once he’s had his fun. Give him a few minutes and he’ll lean right into you for pets, cuddles, and as much lap time as you’re willing to offer.

 

He can entertain himself with enrichment, greet people with excited tail wags, and then relax like a pro. Medium energy, affectionate, and easy to love — Remington is the kind of dog who fits right into your day.

 

If you’ve been looking for a big-hearted companion with a playful side and a snuggly streak, Remington is ready to meet you.

name: Gemma
description_html:
Meet Your New Favorite Couch Buddy 🐾

Looking for a low-key best friend who just gets it? Meet this sweet girl — a 2-year-old pup who is equal parts cuddle bug and easygoing companion.

She’s the kind of dog who fits seamlessly into your life. At home, she’s calm, quiet, and incredibly well-behaved. She doesn’t bark, isn’t destructive, and can be trusted outside of a crate — she truly just wants a comfy spot to relax and be near her people.

Her favorite place? Right next to you (or honestly, on you). She loves affection, belly rubs, and cozying up for naps, but she’s not demanding — just happy to be included.

She also has a playful side! She enjoys toys and a good game of fetch, but she’s not high-energy or overwhelming. Think: a few bursts of fun, then back to lounging.

The highlights:

• 2 years old

• 89% American Pit Bull Terrier / 11% Great Dane

• Female

• Extremely affectionate and human-oriented

• Low energy indoors

• Non-destructive & doesn’t bark

• No resource guarding

• Loves toys and fetch

• Can be left uncrated at home

• Tolerates baths and nail trims well

A couple things to know:

She can be a little itchy at times, which is common and very manageable — a vet can help pinpoint the cause (often something simple like seasonal or food-related allergies).

She may also get excited and frustrated around other dogs on leash. The good news is she’s very trainable, responsive to guidance, and has already shown she does well with structure and corrections. With a bit of consistency, this is something she can continue to improve on.

She gets along well with other dogs in the right setting and would thrive in a home that appreciates her gentle, easygoing nature. Whether you’re working from home or just want a loyal companion to relax with, she’s your girl.

Want to see her personality in action? Check out her foster adventures on Instagram @keep.austin.furry — you’ll get a real look at her goofy, cuddly, everyday self 💛

If you’re looking for a sweet, steady, and loving dog who will make your home feel warmer the moment she walks in — she’s ready to meet you.

name: Theo
description_html:
Theo is a young, energetic pup who’s always ready for his next adventure! He’d thrive in an active home or one with a spacious yard where he can run and play.

He’s never met a stranger. Theo loves attention and happily soaks up affection from everyone he meets. He already knows several commands, including sit, stay, lay down, and “look at me.” He can even catch a treat mid-air about 80% of the time!

Theo could do well with a well-matched dog or cat sibling, or he’d be happy soaking up all the attention as your one-and-only. He loves chewing on toys, chasing balls, watching (or attempting to catch!) birds, and, of course, snuggling up on the couch.

He’ll do best with someone patient who can keep him engaged and help him stay focused, but his sweet, loving personality makes every moment with him worth it.

Theo is ready to bring energy, fun, and lots of love into his forever home!

name: Mama Blythe
description_html:
I’m a 3-year-old girl who realized early on that life is better when you slow down and smell the roses. I’m a 60 lb girl who is convinced I’m a lap dog—and because I'm so gentle, I'd likely be a good match for a home with children to join my fan club!


I’m a very good girl who is house-trained and walks like a dream on my leash. I also just learned how to use the stairs! I’m very treat-motivated, so if you have a snack in your hand, you’ll have my full, undivided attention.


I love my squeaky toys, but my true passion is being near my humans. I might be okay with a dog brother or sister if we’re a good match, but I’d like a home without any feline friends. Ready to fill your home with squeaks and tail wags?

name: Toby
description_html:
Meet Toby, a gentle soul residing at the local shelter. Initially shy, Toby warms up to reveal a

curious and sweet nature. Once comfortable, he unveils a playful side that endears him to all

who spend time with him. Toby's tender approach makes him a perfect companion for quiet

evenings and leisurely walks, where he can explore and learn at his own pace. If you're looking

for a loyal friend who will slowly but surely steal your heart, Toby is your ideal match. His gentle

spirit is just waiting for a place to call home.


Toby is:

  • Housetrained
  • Cuddly with friends
  • Playful and loves a game of fetch, though he may not bring it back
  • Great on leash
  • Extremely smart - will blow through any treat puzzle we give him!
  • An old soul type with some pep in his step

name: Brutus
description_html:
Brutus is a gentle giant. He lounges around most of the day with 3 cats and a bunny. The cats often take over his bed and he allows it. He loves to go on walks and take in all the smells. He is very curious about other dogs but enjoys his space.

A few things to note, he is terrified of thunder, fireworks and any other loud noises. Walks on trash day aren't his favorite and he refuses to go outside if fireworks are being set off... even from quite a distance.

He has so much love to offer and is the perfect mellow couch potato. Crate trained but free roams and is non destructive.

name: Coco Melon
description_html:
Do you have a soft spot for the shy girls who turn into total goofballs once they trust you?


Coco Melon lost her home because someone in the household had allergies, and now this sweet, floppy girl is trying to make sense of shelter life. She can be shy at first and may hang back when meeting new people, but don't be fooled. Once you are a friend, Coco Melon lights up in the best way. 


The version of Coco Melon her friends get to know is bouncy, playful, loving, and full of charm. She loves squeaky toys, enjoys being the center of attention, and already knows commands like sit, down, and paw in Spanish. She is the kind of dog who will surprise you, whether it is her goofy curiosity, her eagerness to connect, or the happy little ways her personality starts to unfold once she feels safe. 


Right now, Coco Melon is still figuring out the shelter environment, but she does not belong here. She belongs in a home where she can exhale, play, be silly, and keep showing off the loving dog she really is. Give her a chance, and you just might feel like you hit the lottery

name: Bandit
description_html:
Bandit was displaced after a house fire. Despite a big interruption to his life, he's a cheerful guy who loves and bonds sweetly with all his friends, and everyone is a friend of Bandit.

He loves opportunities to be outdoorsy, especially playing with toys and balls, and finishing up with a good chew.

What he wants most from life? The freedom to be in a home setting and not in a kennel, a little time outdoors for play, and people to share his life with. He's bringing all the smiles, can you bring him the home?

Check in at the front desk to meet him or if you are offsite, reach out to his advocates online at ClassicCaninesATX or email: caring@classiccanines.org - we aim to make Bandit's transition home an easy one for adopters by helping with a first exam and providing an online gift card for supplies so you can focus on building his toy collection!

name: Marcela
description_html:
Marcela's story will touch your heart. See her backstory video

Part of a family for 4 years, her life took a turn, leaving her feeling lost and alone. Life since then took her to short term stops, but not her happy, stable place in life. Most recently she was found left alone on a major roadway. Marcela knows about abandonment. Yet it's simple kindness, a sense of calm, and acceptance, that is the door to her heart.

She's a great house mate and especially cherishes quiet moments of connection with her people, including playful special moments with her people, and a few toys and comforts here and there. It doesn't take much to make her happy, just a relaxed home to feel safe, secure and loved.

Are you up for granting her wish? She's healthy, spayed and ready to go home right away. Inquire to staff onsite for a meet or reach out to her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org for personalized assistance.

name: Courage
description_html:
Courage is a sweet, sensitive boy with a heart full of love—he’s just waiting for the right person to help him feel safe enough to share it. Shelter life is overwhelming for him, and he’s understandably scared in this noisy, unfamiliar environment. What he needs most is someone patient, kind, and willing to give him a little space to come out of his shell at his own pace.

When you let Courage approach you on his terms, he shows you who he truly is: a gentle treat‑taker, a soft hand‑kisser, and a dog who wants so badly to trust. He moves carefully through the world, taking time to understand his surroundings, but every small step he takes is full of bravery.

He walks politely on a leash and stays close, though sudden noises and quick movements can startle him. With time, consistency, and a calm home, he’s sure to blossom into the cuddle bug he’s meant to be.

Courage has the most soulful eyes—eyes that quietly ask for kindness, patience, and love. You can see how much he wants to bond, to feel safe, and to finally relax into a family of his own.

If you’re looking for a gentle companion who will reward your patience with deep, loyal love, Courage is waiting for you.

name: Noelia
description_html:
Hi, I’m Noelia 💕


I’m sweet, cuddly, and my biggest dream is to be the perfect best friend to my forever family.


I’m a very affectionate girl currently living with my foster brother, Ollie, and we’ve truly become best friends. I’m dog-social and love having a buddy around!


I may be pretty, but I’ve got so much more to offer. While I’m almost the total package, no one is 100% perfect. I can get a little spooked by strangers on walks and may bark when I’m on a leash. Because of this, my foster mom thinks I would do best in a home with a backyard.


Inside the home, I’m a total sweetheart. I’m gentle, loving, and happiest when I’m close to my people getting all the affection I can.


My foster mom knows there is someone out there who will feel so lucky to have me, and I know I’ll feel just as lucky to have them.


If you’re ready to give me a loving home and spoil me like the princess I am, I’d love to meet you ✨

name: Daisy
description_html:
Thelma was found running in the busy road right outside of the shelter. Thankfully she was caught before anything happened to her, and she is now at Austin Animal Services!


Thelma may give a few barks when you walk by her kennel but once that gate is open she can’t get into your lap fast enough! If you are looking for a cuddle bug then this is your girl!


💛 Sweetheart

💛 Cuddly

💛 Playful

💛 Great on Leash

💛 Treat Motivated

💛 Volunteer Favorite

name: Scout
description_html: Scout is a striking 6yo tuxedo cat who is a true companion at heart. She is a social girl who loves nothing more than being around her people and will often be found curled up right on the bed for a long nap. Scout is an expert at finding the coziest hiding spots for a deep sleep, but she also has a fun, energetic side that comes out during her nightly zoomies. She is incredibly easy to please, showing enthusiasm for every toy she finds and excitement for any treat offered to her. She may get overstimulated in certain situations, so needs an adopter who understands that behavior and will respect her boundaries when she gets a little too excited. Scout tells us she prefers to be the only pet in the home so that she can be adored for all her unique qualities!

name: Oso
description_html: Oso has the kind of soul that quietly steals your heart and never gives it back. At 4 years old, he is gentle, deeply loving, and just wants to belong to a family of his own. He melts into cuddles, leans into love, and looks at you like you’re his whole world. Oso is wonderful with kids, adores other dogs, and greets everyone he meets with warmth and trust. When the weather turns cold, he happily snuggles up in his little jammies, perfectly content just being close. Oso isn’t just looking for a home—he’s waiting for his people, the ones he can love forever. If you meet him, you’ll understand why he’s impossible to forget. 💙🐾

name: Ivy
description_html:
Meet Ivy: A Sweet, Loving Companion 🌿

Ivy is a gentle, affectionate girl who thrives on companionship. She walks nicely on a loose leash, is impressively responsive to her name when called, and loves napping while cuddled up with you on the couch.

She enjoys walks in nature and taking in all the sights and smells. Ivy is curious about squirrels (she’ll happily pause to watch them in a tree) but with a little encouragement or a treat, she’s easy to redirect and continue on her walk.

Ivy gets along well with other dogs, greeting them politely and enjoying relaxed, friendly interactions. She’s also courteous and calm indoors, making her easy to live with in almost any setting.

Ivy can be a bit sensitive to loud or new noises, but reassurance from her person quickly settles her. She's housetrained, well-behaved indoors, and respects boundaries unless invited onto furniture. Smart and intuitive, it seems that she would learn a routine quickly.

Ivy’s previous family was heartbroken to have to surrender her due to breed restrictions at their new apartment—through no fault of her own. Now she’s looking for a forever home that will appreciate her love, intelligence, and cuddly personality.


Ideal Home: Ivy would thrive in a household with adults, teens, and/or another compatible dog. She’s ready for adventures, walks, treats, and most importantly, endless cuddles.

name: Indy
description_html:
Meet Indy – Your Future Adventure Buddy & Professional Cuddle Companion! 🐾

Indy is a smart, playful girl with a big heart and an even bigger love for her people. She truly believes everyone she meets is her new best friend — and she’s not wrong. 💛


This bright girl is always ready to run and romp with her dog friends! She was in a foster home with a 9-year-old Mini Aussie and a 2-year-old Lab and loved every minute of playtime. Indy is dog social and would absolutely thrive in a home with a doggie friend. She's also a cuddle bug and loves to curl up behind you while you nap and is happiest when she's close to her person. If left alone, she may cry a little — she just really loves company!


Indy is incredibly smart and picks up on new things quickly. She enjoys puzzle toys, Kongs and durable chew toys/bones. She's still working on her house and crate training, she's very treat motivated so we are confident she'll master this with continued practice.


Indy walks nicely on leash but as any curious puppy she can be easily distracted by the exciting world around her. With her quick mind and eagerness to learn, she has great potential to become a wonderful walking partner.


Indy’s Ideal Home:

  • Another young, playful dog
  • Active adults who can provide structure and training
  • Plenty of durable toys and enrichment


If you’re looking for a playful best friend who will keep you laughing, learning, and snuggling, Indy might just be your girl. 🐶💕

name: River
description_html: River showed up at the home of a nice person who gave her a chance indoors and she blossomed. While she may be shy in a kennel, she is lovable and affectionate in the home. She has a cute little void face and big eyes that blink slowly when we chat with her. She may do well with a cat friend (as most cats who come from outdoors do). River is looking for a calm place to relax and show her true self.

name: Yuji
description_html:
Shhh,,real quiet like, my name is Yuji and I'm the shy lady in my kennel, sometimes trying not to be noticed. I always let my dog friend handle the human business because I'm the best dog's friend you could ever ask for. My best friend from home was Amy and she was adopted. It kind of ripped my heart out. Then my best friend was Shadow and he was adopted too. I really want to keep my dog friends, not loose them. So if your dog is lonely and looking for a friend, maybe you can pick me and we'll try it out?

I'm pretty content and easy to please, no fluff needed for me and I walk nicely whether on my own or with a dog friend. Conflict? Not for me.

I hope you'll come take a look and schedule a dog meet for me so I can join a friendship instead of losing them at the shelter. What do you say?

name: Rusty
description_html:
Meet Rusty 💛

Rusty is a joyful, fun-loving pup who's ready to find his forever family! With his sweet nature and boundless energy, he brings happiness everywhere he goes. He loves being part of the action-whether that's playing fetch in the yard, going for neighborhood walks, or simply curling up near his favorite people after a day of fun.

Rusty thrives on attention and companionship. He's happiest when he's included and involved, making him a wonderful match for an active family or someone looking for a loyal best friend by their side.

The best part? Rusty already has a great foundation! He's potty trained, crate trained, and knows his basic commands. He's smart, eager to please, and loves learning new things-so continued training will be both easy and fun.

If you're looking for a loving, playful, and devoted companion who will greet you with a wagging tail and endless affection, Rusty could be the perfect addition to your home. He's ready to give his whole heart to his forever family-could that be you? 🐾💕

name: Vittorio
description_html: Vittorio is a compact model of love and charm that comes equipped with extra peripheral vision. He knows a thing or two about keeping a tidy house, as he keeps his kennel clean and seems house trained. While he may look worried, that's just him waiting to see if his attempts at telepathy are working--he wants to read your mind, share his own ideas with you, and make you happy! He can't wait to show you he's the goodest boy who loves back scratches, playing fetch, and walks with you on the other end of his leash!

name: Jagger
description_html:
Jagger, with his cute ears, is the ultimate best friend looking for his forever home! At 50 pounds of pure charm, this sleek, handsome guy is as well-mannered as he is striking. Jagger is house-trained, great on a leash, and ready to settle into your daily routine with ease.

His favorite thing in the world? A good game of fetch! Jagger is always ready to show off his impressive athleticism and playful spirit. When it’s time to head out for an adventure, he’s a total pro, making him the perfect companion for strolls through your favorite Austin park or neighborhood trails.

With his soulful eyes and sweet personality, Jagger is ready to bring endless joy and companionship to a loving family. Come meet this perfect boy and get ready to fall in love!

name: Blu
description_html:
Blu is a handsome boy with a light brown coat that seems to glow gold in the sunlight and striking light-colored eyes that will stop you in your tracks.

This sweet, friendly boy has a big heart and an even bigger zest for life. He loves toys, treats, and affection from his people. Blu is easy to leash up and ready to go, though he can pull with excitement and may get a little over the top around other dogs, so he’d likely thrive as your one and only sidekick.

With a bit of guidance and consistency, his loving personality truly shines.


Come meet Blu and let this golden boy light up your life!

name: The Duchess Of Purr
description_html:
The Duchess was in foster care and this is what her foster had to say about her!


"She’s the sweetest. She’s extremely in tune with people. She loves nibbling on fingers and toes but will respect boundaries. Loves to party at 3 am. Purrs like a symphony. Will attack the vacuum. 10/10 lovely cat and deserves a loving home."


This girl is pretty scared at the shelter, so we would love to see her back in a home ASAP! Adopt The Duchess of Purr today and give her a stress-free life in a loving home.

name: Beefy
description_html:
Meet Beefy! A gentleman with a heart of gold and a personality to match! This lovable goofball is all smiles and wiggles, and he lives for playtime and making new friends.


Beefy is a very calm, gentle guy. He enjoys sitting in the grass and cuddling. Walks loosely on the leash and is very chill.


He would be a very low maintenance pet and just wants to hang out. Very very easygoing guy.

name: Darnell
description_html:
Darnel is as big-hearted as he is big-eared! 

 This playful, silly boy has lots of energy and loves toys, treats, and a good game of fetch. Once Darnell feels comfortable, his affectionate side really shines. He's gentle taking treats, and knows some tricks like "sit." He also lives with another dog at the shelter and could well with a dog-sibling after a meet and greet.

 Darnell can be a little shy at first and would do great with a patient person who will let him warm up at his own pace. Give him that chance, and you'll gain a loyal companion. 

 Think Darnell might be your guy? Come meet this big-eared goofball!

name: Helios
description_html:
This sweet boy is the perfect mix of playful and affectionate! He has medium energy and would thrive in an active home where he can enjoy walks, playtime, and plenty of love.

He walks nicely on leash with a harness and enjoys getting out for strolls, spending time in the play yard, or exploring during outings. One of his favorite things in the world is a tennis ball—he loves a good game of fetch and will happily bring the ball back, either dropping it at your feet or gently letting you take it from him.

When playtime is over, he’s all about the cuddles. He’s a total snuggler who loves belly rubs and being close to his people. He’s also very gentle, enjoys treats, and already knows the sit command—making training fun and rewarding.

He appears to be housetrained, is leash trained, and seems calm when passing other dogs or people on walks. With his playful spirit, loving personality, and fondness for treats, he’s ready to bring lots of joy to his future family!

name: Oliver Sebastian
description_html:
