They are two halves of the same heart, waiting for a place where they can finally exhale. Pam and Tiger are ready for their true forever home—and they’ll need to find it together.

name: Opie
description_html:
Meet Loki 💚

Loki is a happy, social boy who’s been making lots of friends lately—and winning hearts wherever he goes! He’s shown himself to be comfortable with new people, with no signs of shyness or sensitivity to touch. He’s just an easygoing, friendly pup who enjoys being around others.

Loki really lights up when he’s out of his kennel. Whether he’s heading out for a walk (where he does great on leash) or enjoying playtime in the yard with his favorite toys, he’s all about having fun and soaking up the moment.

In our short times in a mock living room, Loki has been a wonderful guest—non-destructive, curious, and eager to explore his surroundings. He especially loved lounging on the couch and trying to take in the view from the window, showing off his relaxed and cozy side.

With his combination of playful energy and laid-back charm, Loki is ready to fit right into a home where he can keep making friends, enjoying toys, and sharing plenty of happy moments.

name: Miss Pretty
description_html:
Happy is as happy does and Miss Pretty is a happy girl..however.. she's a little shy at first. Don't be surprised if standing in front of her kennel causes her to run and hide. She's worth the meet. You'll soon be on her friend's list. Ask staff to get her out, or if offsite, arrange a meet up with her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org. Need a meet up with a dog? That will be arranged too.


Miss Pretty has so much to offer:

--She'll never turn down a treat

--She loves comforts and is non-destructive

--She's very house trained , she's also crate trained

--She walks nicely on a leash, not bothered by other dogs

--Her favorite activities: window watching & extraordinary sniff walk skills

--Also a pro at riding in the car

--Perfect companionship

Fees are waived and there are support benefits from her team so you can focus on the important things,,spending time with your new dog.

name: Sage
description_html:
Are you looking for a playful and sweet girl? Sage might be the dog for you!

Sage loves spending time with volunteer friends in the play yard, where her fun personality really shines. She’s a supreme toy tester and a bit of a ham for the camera — always ready to show off her silly side. Sage still has a wonderfully young spirit and plenty of playful energy. After she gets her initial zoomies out, she’s happy to settle into a nice walk and enjoy the world around her. 

You might hear Sage chatting in her kennel, but she’s just trying to tell you hello — and maybe ask if you’ll take her home. Sage is friendly with people and has lived with other dogs before, too. We can host a doggie meetup with yours and see how the dogs hit it off.

This comeback princess has left her past behind and is ready for a life filled with love, comfort, and new adventures. Ask staff for help to meet her or if offsite reach out to her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org.

name: Gypsy
description_html:
Gypsy is a polite little lady with lovely manners and a steady, easygoing nature. She’s wonderfully house trained, knows when it’s potty time, and enjoys following her nose through the grass like a tiny explorer on a mission. After a long day of fun adventure, she likes to sit back down, kick her feet up, and relax, making her a great friend to decompress with.

Gypsy can be a bit particular about her doggy friends, but she handles those moments with grace and tolerance.

Looking for a sweet soul with a whole lot of heart? Come meet Gypsy and let her charm her way right into your life!

name: Kano
description_html:
Meet social butterfly Kano with a butterfly marking on his head to prove it!: a perfect couch potato, walking buddy, and part-time tap dancer 💃🐶

Kano is a young senior bulldog ~experienced, distinguished, and past the “eat your shoes” phase. He’s fully house trained, crate trained, dog friendly, cat curious and respectful, and he loves every person he meets, big and little.

His signature move? The morning tippy-tappys—a full performance the second he gets out of bed that will absolutely make your day every day.

Kano is a relaxed walker on leash, a big fan of car rides (windows down, ears flapping, living his best life), and always down for a good walk… followed by a nap, obviously. He’s a social eater, so he prefers a little companionship nearby at mealtimes.

Sweet, affectionate and full of quiet charm he's an easy fit for so many households.

Check out his short video

Kano is staying with a foster, reach out on his link for a meetup or email his advocates with questions at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Tiger
description_html:
Meet Tiger — professional snuggler, amateur fetch champion, and your future soul dog. (Seriously this guy has so much soul dog potential)

Tiger is the kind of dog who believes personal space is more of a suggestion than a rule. His love language? Oh, just all of them. Hugs, snuggles, cuddles — he loves to be close.

This young Lab mix has quickly become a volunteer favorite, mostly because it’s impossible to have a bad day when Tiger is around. He greets new people like long-lost friends and bonds fast — blink once and he’s already decided you’re his person.

He’s also got a playful side and is always up for a game of fetch (his technique is still evolving, but his enthusiasm is Olympic-level). And when the energy wears off, he’s right back to his true calling: cuddling like it’s a competitive sport.

Tiger seems house-trained and would likely thrive in a home where he can tag along on walks, hikes, or any adventure that ends with him curled up next to you on the couch. He’s equal parts explorer and couch companion — the best of both worlds. Whether your home is an apartment or a house with a yard, Tiger seems like he can fit into a lot of homes… as long as you’re ready to provide regular access to snuggles and affection.


If you’re looking for a dog who will love you forever, Tiger’s your guy. Email his volunteer advocates at blueplusbusters@gmail.com to meet him!

name: Bunny
description_html: Bunny came in with her litter mates when their owner could no longer afford to keep them. She's a sensitive soul and prefers to hide when things are stressful or loud. Bunny would do best in a low traffic, quiet home and may do well with cat friends. It may take a little time to earn her trust, but once she settles in we think she will make a very loyal and affectionate companion!

name: Ginger Lou
description_html:
Ginger recently arrived in our yard from parts unknown. She's a sweet babe, and she loves humans. We have a 7-year-old human, a 2-year-old family dog, and a 15-year-old cat. Ginger is enamored of the human, playful with the family dog, and curious about the cat from a safe distance.


Ginger's a young pup, so she's all potential. She needs exercise and attention to keep up with her appetite and social development. She's very quickly becoming crate trained, and she's excellent on a leash for her young age (no pulling and no leash aggression so far). Despite being chummy with the family dog, she's shown some food aggression and territorial behavior when family members show affection to the family dog. In our case, the family dog concedes without much of a tussle, but keep in mind that Ginger doesn't yet feel secure about having resources. She needs time and consistent, positive reinforcement.


If you're looking for a loyal, energetic, intelligent friend who brings joyful energy to your world, Ginger might just be the dog for you!

name: Hachi
description_html:
Meet Hachi 💖

Hachi is a sweet girl with a fun, energetic spark! At first, she may show off her playful, “wild child” side—especially when heading out on a leash—but she quickly settles into a nice rhythm and becomes an easy, mostly loose-leash walking companion.

In the play yard, Hachi enjoys doing her own thing but still likes being near her people. She’s the perfect mix of independent and affectionate. One of her absolute favorite things? A kiddie pool! Splash time brings out her joyful, carefree personality.

And when she’s ready to slow down, Hachi has a softer side that’s impossible to resist. Lately, she’s been hopping right into laps for snuggles, soaking up all the love she can get.

Hachi is a wonderful blend of playful energy and growing affection, and she’s ready to bring both fun and cuddles into her future home.

name: Daisy
description_html:
Daisy is a super sweet. She does well with other dogs and loves to spend her day relaxing while every once in a while playing with the occasional toy. She was found with her (presumed) sister, Rosie, and we would prefer they be adopted together as they are quite attached.


She is house and crate trained. She can be a little anxious on a leash at first, but once she trusts you she will follow you anywhere. Overall just a great, sweet dog. Please give her a chance to show you!

name: Rosie
description_html:
Rosie is a very sweet girl. She’s great with other dogs, calm mannered and a couch potato! She was found with her (presumed) sister, Daisy, and we would prefer they be adopted together as they are quite attached.


She is house and crate trained. She can be a bit anxious on a leash at first but once she trusts you it’s easy for her to just walk next to you. Overall just a great, sweet dog. Please give her a chance to show you!

name: Jiminy Cricket
description_html: Jiminy Cricket is a very level-headed dog. He is calm and confident, and walks loosely on a leash. He enjoys pets and cuddles and may try to sit in your lap. Jiminy is friendly with people and other dogs. He also has a fun, playful side. Jiminy loves to run zoomies in the playyard and is on the lookout for squirrels. Come meet this handsome affectionate boy!

name: Olive
description_html:
Olive is a total sweetheart who just wants to be near her people. She loves to cuddle and hang out by your side, but she’s also playful and does great with other dogs (she’s been awesome with ours).


She has a lot of energy and that fun, puppy-like playfulness — she loves her toys and is always up for some playtime.


She’s fully house-trained and hasn’t had any accidents — she’s really good about letting you know when she needs to go out. We have been kenneling her when we are not home and she is learning to go right in. She hasn’t been destructive while in it. She’s still learning on the leash, but she’s doing well and is friendly with both people and other dogs on walks.


Olive is good with kids. She can get a little excited and jumpy when she’s happy, but she’s learning quickly and already picking up on commands.


Overall, she’s just a really loving, playful dog who wants to be part of your everyday life!

name: Kitty
description_html:
Kitty is the kind of dog who turns heads the moment you meet her. Her tall, perky ears stand straight up like little exclamation points, always ready to catch the sound of a friendly voice or the rustle of something interesting. She has a gentle, sweet demeanor that makes you feel instantly at ease, and you can tell there’s so much personality just waiting to blossom once she finds her person.

She carries a large scar along her back, a quiet reminder that her start in life wasn’t easy. Kitty can’t tell us what she’s been through, but what’s remarkable is how she refuses to let her past dim her view of people. She greets the world with hope, softness, and a willingness to trust again.

On walks, Kitty begins with enthusiasm, then settles into a slower pace where she can take in the world—sniffing the breeze, watching the scenery, and enjoying the simple pleasure of being outside with someone she likes. Her favorite spot on campus is the Real Life Room, where she melts into snuggles and shows us exactly what she’s dreaming of: a home of her own.

Kitty is a world-class cuddler. She loves chin scratches, gives the sweetest hugs, and has mastered the art of climbing onto a chair just to be closer to you for more affection. She’s tender, observant, and endlessly loving.

Kitty is ready for someone who sees her not for the scar on her back, but for the bright, beautiful future she’s eager to share. If you’re looking for a loyal companion with a gentle soul and a heart full of love, Kitty is waiting to meet you.

name: Hooza Goodboy (Louie)
description_html:
Meet Hooza — apply to meet him!

No pressure to adopt after the meet & greet.

Big, handsome dog with a soft, calm, and snuggly personality

Loves:

  • Lounging on the couch
  • Cuddling
  • Quiet companionship
  • Napping (with adorable soft snores)

Easygoing lifestyle:

  • Enjoys slow, relaxed walks
  • Likes to stop and observe the world
  • Happy to sit and people-watch for hours

Very gentle:

  • Never pulls on the leash
  • Walks right beside you
  • Takes treats softly and carefully

Dog-friendly:

  • Does well with other dogs
  • Especially great with calm, gentle dogs

Well-trained & low-maintenance:

  • Housetrained & leash trained
  • Great in apartments
  • Comfortable staying home alone
  • Not picky with food; takes meds easily

Personality at home:

  • Greets you with a wagging tail
  • Prefers cuddles over walks
  • Loves sleeping in bed with you (or nearby)
  • Best fit:Calm, low-key home
  • Someone who loves a quiet, gentle companion

----

Conoce a Hooza — ¡aplica para conocerlo!

Sin compromiso de adoptar después de conocerlo.

Perro grande y guapo con una personalidad dulce, tranquila y cariñosa

Le encanta:

  • Descansar en el sofá
  • Acurrucarse
  • La compañía tranquila
  • Dormir (¡ronca suavemente!)

Estilo de vida relajado:Paseos tranquilos y sin prisa

  • Le gusta observar su entorno
  • Feliz viendo pasar gente y perros

Muy gentil:

  • Nunca tira de la correa
  • Camina a tu lado
  • Toma premios con mucho cuidado

Bueno con otros perros:

  • Se lleva bien con otros perros
  • Especialmente con perros tranquilos y calmados

Bien educado y fácil de cuidar:

  • Entrenado para hacer sus necesidades afuera
  • Sabe caminar con correa
  • Ideal para apartamentos
  • Puede quedarse solo en casa sin problema
  • No es exigente con la comida; toma medicina fácilmente

En casa:

  • Te recibe moviendo la cola
  • Prefiere abrazos antes que paseos
  • Le gusta dormir contigo o cerca

Hogar ideal:

  • Tranquilo y sin mucho movimiento
  • Con alguien que valore su carácter dulce y calmado

name: Spaghettio
description_html: Uh oh Spaghettio! This sweet, big puppy girl will steal your heart the second you meet her! She's so joyful and is just starting to grow into her big body (she still occasionally accidentally bumps her head on our legs in excitement when we take her out to play). But don't get it twisted - she's not truly derpy. In fact, sweet Spaghettio knows sit and is smart as heck. We can tell she will learn more tricks very easily because she loves to please! She also loves toys, affection, and sitting on laps! She would be a fantastic adventure buddy for someone who enjoys being out and about. Come meet this sweet doofy puppy!

name: Lila
description_html: Lila is a bouncy lady who loves snuggles. She enjoys treats and will sit calmly by your side after she has gotten her wiggles out. Lila loves playing fetch and would do well having a yard for exercise or a plan for walks on leash. She's an excellent walking companion, too! Lila is housetrained and knows to "sit" for treats. This smart girl is just beginning her journey and is looking for a loving adopter to join her!

name: Dannie
description_html:
Meet Dannie ~ The newest member of the social mixer


Arriving in a shelter at 12 is no laughing matter but this sweet lady came on the scene with a nice energy and a sunny disposition at all times. She truly loves the many friends she makes in people, kids and dog friends and maybe even cat friends (we'll let you know!).

She's staying in a foster family home where she's proven great house manners. She goes for walks daily and wants to be in the middle of all the family activities. She'll eventually flop down for a recharge nap and then be ready for the next round of family fun. She sleeps through the night soundly to prepare for each day ahead.

While she's in her foster home she's getting her wellness needs taken care of through sponsorship by ClassicCaninesATX so her health will be tip top for the rest of her years to come, for picnics, park trips, tenting it with the kids in the yard, and anything else she can hone in on.

Are you looking for a sweet lady that fits in everywhere? Reach out on her link to start a conversation with her foster or reach out to caring@classiccanines.org

See my short video here

name: Felicia
description_html:
Felicia has been in need of a fresh start in life to provide her the comforts and privileges of an indoors dog. She and her dog family spent a few hard years being exposed to the weather. It's time for a safe "happily ever after". While waiting for her silver lining, Felicia was welcomed to a foster home where she's getting reacquainted with an indoors lifestyle. She's gentle, sweet and easy, rides well in a car and walks nicely on a leash. She’s learning how to play but prefers to follow her people around and snuggle any chance she gets. She's very polite to cats both indoors and outdoors, and is sharing a home with a very cute small older dog friend. She would probably enjoy a friendly, polite dog she can snuggle and play with. She's shown herself to be a well rounded lady.

Here's a chance to make real change in a life where it will be so very appreciated. She will repay you in doggie kisses and loyalty to be your companion and family pet.

name: Cupcake
description_html:
Cupcake is a modern, independent lady! She knows what she wants and has no problem sharing her feelings, which we appreciate. Her main requirement is that she be your only cat, the queen of the castle.

Cupcake loves to play with toys and hang out wherever her favorite people are. Her favorite game is "hunting" toys, so be sure to stock up on plenty of toy mice for this adventurous girl. Cupcake isn't fond of kennel life, so we'd love to see her in a real home ASAP, either through adoption or foster!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Cupcake and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Angel
description_html:
Brawn AND brains? Yes, please. 💙

This sweet girl is the total package—affectionate, smart, and full of personality. She lives for love and will happily trade treats for cuddles any day. Expect lots of kisses, snuggles, and her signature wiggle butt when she’s showing off her skills!

✔️ Knows: sit, down, stop, come, paw

✔️ Fully potty trained

✔️ Crate trained (just prefers not to be left too long)

✔️ Super people-focused and eager to please

She gets the cutest little wrinkles when she’s waiting for praise—because attention is her favorite reward.

On leash, she’s a strong girl and can pull, so she’ll benefit from some continued training—but she’s smart and motivated, so she’s a great candidate to learn quickly.

If you’re looking for a loyal, loving, and fun companion who wants to be your shadow and your snuggle buddy, she’s your girl.

Come meet her—you’ll fall in love fast. 🐾💙

name: Kit
description_html:
Kit was brought to the shelter after his owner passed away. This can be a tough transition for a pet, and Kit is no exception. He's having a hard time with kennel life, and the best thing for this big, gentle boy would be a quiet home for him to relax in and get used to his next chapter in life. He enjoys pets and appreciates encouragement to help him feel like a brave boy.


His foster let us know: "Kit (I’ve been calling him Big Kitty) has done amazing with me in foster care and has been eating and drinking well.


He’s a docile gentle giant that loves attention and affection. While he is a quiet guy, he has a ferocious purr and a strong head butt. He loves to snuggle and would be a great lap cat. He enjoys laying with his wand toys, but always defers to resting in my lap for snuggles."

name: Linda Lou
description_html:
Meet Linda Lou 💕🐾

Well hello there, darling — I’m Linda Lou, and yes, I’m every bit as charming as my name sounds.

I’m a sweet girl with a gentle heart and a loving soul. I am very shy when it comes to meeting new people but am working on my bravery. My favorite things in life are soft beds, kind humans, tasty treats, and being told I’m pretty (which I will gladly accept at any hour of the day). I’ve got a calm, affectionate nature.

I’m the kind of dog who wants to be part of your everyday life. Morning coffee companion? That’s me. Couch cuddle supervisor? Absolutely. Loyal best friend who listens without judgment? I was born for it.

I may take a little time to settle into new situations, but once I know I’m safe and loved, my personality blossoms beautifully. Underneath it all is a dog who simply wants connection, comfort, and someone to love forever.

Here’s what you should know about me:

  • I give world-class cuddle energy
  • I have a heart as soft as my puppy-dog eyes
  • I’m happiest just being near my people
  • I will absolutely become your little shadow

I’ve been dreaming about a forever home where I can finally exhale, feel safe, and spend my days loving the humans lucky enough to choose me.

If you’re looking for a loyal companion with sweetness, grace, and just a sprinkle of sass, I think we should meet.

Love,

Linda Lou 🐶💗

name: Evan
description_html:
Meet Evan 💙

Evan is a gentle, sweet boy who has made wonderful progress building his confidence during his time at the shelter. Watching him come out of his shell has been such a joy—he truly wants to connect and be close to his people.

This handsome pup is a dream on leash, walking calmly by your side without pulling. He’s also very treat-motivated and already knows how to sit, which makes continuing his training both easy and fun.

Evan can still be a little sensitive to touch at first, but he’s trying so hard—leaning in, learning to trust, and showing more comfort every day. It’s clear he wants affection and is figuring out how to enjoy it at his own pace. He’s done great meeting new people, including a recent introduction to a new volunteer, where he showed just how far he’s come.

With a little patience and a lot of love, Evan is going to blossom into an incredibly loyal and affectionate companion. If you’re looking for a kind-hearted dog to grow with, Evan is ready to meet you.

name: Sushi
description_html: Sushi is a shy girl who has lived with big and little dogs and small children. In her previous home she hid much of the time, though. Since she's on the shyer side, she may prefer a less active home with more peace and calm to help her relax. Sushi can be very affectionate, she just needs to feel safe and secure first. She is available for foster or adoption today!

name: Toast
description_html: Toast is a sweet little boy who loves a good scratching session. He is very food motivated, so training is fairly easy. He loves being outside exploring (in a fenced in yard/park) and chasing bugs. He does well in his crate, is mostly potty trained (he has had a few random accidents inside), and mostly knows simple commands such as sit and down. We are still working with him on doing well on a leash, but he does better every time we take him out. He loves to play fetch (he does come back after throwing a toy, but he may not come directly to you). He loves to cuddle when he's ready for a nap, and does well when it's time to wind down at night. He's a classic sweet little puppy!

name: Beans
description_html: Beans is a sweet little girl who absolutely loves a good scratching session. She is very food motivated, so training is fairly easy. She loves being outside exploring (in a fenced in yard/park) and chasing bugs. She does well in her crate, is potty trained, and mostly knows simple commands such as sit and down. We are still working with her on doing well on a leash, but she does better every time we take her out. She loves to chew, so make sure you have a good variety of toys, as well as give her enough mental stimulation and physical activity. She's a classic sweet little puppy!

name: Buddy
description_html: Buddy and his friends were found abandoned in a crate by a community member. While they are shy in the shelter, we think all they will need is some TLC and a calm home to decompress in to show their true personalities. They may do well in a home with a cat friend for companionship or one of their siblings.

name: Benicio
description_html:
You will be impressed with the manners of this young man. And he's so very attentive to his person,, and impressionable! He wants to seal your approval. He walks in lockstep with his person, so very easy and gentle, well trained on a leash. He's also stayed in a crate before and seems house trained.

Come meet all that you're missing in a trusty, true, gentle companion.

name: Uzi
description_html:
Sweet and confident little man "Uzi" arrived to the shelter with a brother just like him who was adopted.

He's now staying in a foster home and here's what his foster says about him: "He loves giving kisses, jumping, and playing fetch. He does well in a room alone for up to 9 hours and is potty trained. He has a great stamina during play time and is confident, leading you on walks without lunging or barking."

Uzi is bold, confident and always excited meeting new small dog friends.

After meeting Uzi, a doggie meet up can be scheduled at the shelter if needed.

Uzi's adoption comes with an extra layer of support from his friends at ClassicCaninesATX - he receives a Chewy gift card for fun toys and supplies, and a veterinary care credit to help for his future wellness needs.

Reach out on his link to inquire to his foster or to caring@classiccanines.org

name: Poppy
description_html: I am a wiggly happy little puppy. Shy at first but very cuddly and playful once I'm comfortable. I like other dogs, even the big ones! Kitties are okay too. I'm eager to learn and happy to make my owners happy too!

name: Woody
description_html:
Woody is the sweetest dog. He's very gentle and careful, even when playing, and is great with kids of all ages. He loves tug of war and will politely bring a toy so you can play. Or he drops one so you can throw it for him! He is house trained and will wait by the door to go outside or make a little squeak to remind you it's time to go. Woody rarely barks and never at other dogs but is loud when you need him. Woody came to us severely underweight but after a little time with his foster he's fully healthy! He would be a lovable addition to any home, with or without children or pets.


Email me if you have any questions: austfosts@gmail.com

name: Minnie
description_html:
Meet the lady who's waiting to welcome you to her kennel, the same way she'll welcome you home. She loves being part of the world around her and every chance to watch, observe and do.

Minnie is an experienced apartment resident. She's housetrained, walks nicely on leash, passes dogs easily and shows us she's well versed in stair stepping, and an excellent friend for step counting. She also enjoys dipping her paws into a pool and a light paw chase with the squirrels. Don't worry, they easily outrun her.

She's a pleasant friend to have in your life as a faithful, fun companion.

Minnie is advocated for by her friends at ClassicCanineATX - meet her onsite or write with questions at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Gus
description_html:
Meet Gus — a 12/10 good boy who’s ready to bring joy, laughs, and lots of love into his forever home!


Gus is incredibly friendly with both people and other dogs. He’s playful and fun, but also thoughtful—he’s great at adjusting his energy to match his canine buddies, whether they’re ready to romp or just hang out.


He’s still a young guy at heart and gets excited to say hello, so he’s working on keeping all four paws on the ground. Because of that enthusiasm, he may do best with older kids while he continues learning his manners.


Gus loves getting out for a nice long walk (about a mile is his sweet spot), and he’s a dream on leash with his Easy Walk harness. When the day winds down, he’s just as happy curling up next to you on the couch for some quality cuddle time.


He’s a total star at home too—crate trained, no potty accidents, and not destructive. He understands “no,” settles in easily, and even handles mealtime and bedtime in his crate without a fuss. His only quirk? He sometimes likes to start the day a little early—but he makes up for it with enthusiasm and tail wags!


Bonus: Gus loves ice cubes—they’re his favorite treat.


Gus would thrive in a home with another playful dog and an active family who can give him a couple of good walks each day. If you’re looking for a sweet, fun-loving companion who’s equal parts adventure buddy and cuddle bug, Gus might just be your perfect match.

name: Roux
description_html: Roux was on his own for quite some time. He was staying on an abandoned property in east Austin. Neighbors slowly made friends and Roux went directly into foster with a neighbor. He is shy at first, but opens up to people quickly. He loves people, treats, and affection. Roux is a laid back dog that loves to hang out in the yard, snuggle, or play with his people. He is house trained and is learning all the tricks. He’s a very smart boy!

name: Pippy
description_html:
If you’re looking for a puppy who brings equal parts joy, personality, and cuddle time—this girl is ready to steal your heart.


With her beautiful red coat, short hair, floppy ears, and long and wagging tail, she turns heads wherever she goes.


She’s bubbly, energetic, and always ready for playtime—especially a good game of tag—but she also knows how to slow down and recharge. She seeks out cozy, quiet spots for naps and happily settles in for cuddle time after a day of fun.


This smart, food-motivated pup is human-focused, which makes training both easy and rewarding. She’s eager to learn and thrives with consistency. Her favorite activities include playing with stuffed toys, working on Kongs, and engaging in tug-of-war.


She’s getting along great with her foster dog siblings, showing great social skills and adaptability.

She’s crate-trained for overnight sleep, settling in after a few minutes of complaining and sleeping soundly through the night. 


Like many puppies, she’s currently teething and can be a bit mouthy during play, and she’s recently discovered her bark—which she uses to communicate curiosity, uncertainty, or excitement. With consistent reinforcement, she’s well on her way to becoming a confident and well-mannered companion.


She would thrive in a home that can offer her playtime, structure, and ideally a yard where she can enjoy one of her favorite things—grass under her paws and tag.


She is available for adoption now. Reach out to meet her and see if she’s the perfect addition to your home!

name: Kianu
description_html: Meet Kianu! This striking black cat, with a little white tuft on his chest and big, round eyes, is a total sweetheart. Keanu is super social, loves to chat, and gets along wonderfully with other cats—sharing food, cuddling, and even playtime. Though he’s curious about the outdoors, he’s a happy indoor cat. He would do best in a dog-free home, as he can get a bit stressed around dogs. If you’re looking for a cuddly, talkative companion, Kianu might just be your guy!

name: Buckwheat
description_html:
Meet Buckwheat 🤎

Buckwheat is a gentle soul who’s still finding his footing in the busy shelter environment. All the sights and sounds can be a bit overwhelming for him—but once he gets a chance to relax, his sweet and silly personality really starts to shine.

Out in a play yard, Buckwheat is an absolute delight. He loves to stretch his legs with little joyful runs during his breaks, showing off a playful side that’s sure to make you smile. Despite the stress of shelter life, he’s been impressively well-mannered and appears to be very housetrained.

Buckwheat is a quiet, laid-back boy who would much prefer a calm, peaceful setting where he can decompress at his own pace. On leash, he can be a bit nervous at first, but you’ll notice him relax more and more as you move away from the shelter environment.

What stands out most about Buckwheat is his heart—you can tell he truly wants to connect and accept love, even while he’s still building confidence. The best way to win him over is simple: patience, kindness, and letting him come to you when he’s ready.

In the right home, Buckwheat is going to blossom into a loyal, loving companion who will make every bit of that patience worth it.

name: Smores
description_html: Smores wants you to know two things: he loves people and he loves the outdoors! He may be your perfect hiking companion, or your beach buddy. This happy, friendly boy is ready for any adventure you decide to take him on. He has also shown relaxed interest in being friends with other dogs. Smores is so lovable and affectionate, we can't bear to see him here one more day! Adopt Smores and bring sunshine into your life.

name: Bonsai
description_html: Bonsai is friendly & outgoing with new people, and she loves to cuddle. This affectionate girl would love nothing more than to snuggle on a rainy day and make sure there's a spot for her in bed. She's also very smart. She knows "sit", "stay" and "down". Bonsai is active, and likes to run in yards or be your buddy on leash walks. Bonsai has enjoyed the company of other dogs and makes a great play mate for them, too!

name: Hobbes
description_html: Hobbes is perfect with a capital P. He doesn’t react to dogs, birds, or squirrels on walks. He walks alongside you with a loose leash. He LOVES cuddles and pets more than anything else. Hobbes would probably live happily in an apartment; he's quiet and small-sized, and really just wants to snuggle with people. Hobbes is a social butterfly waiting for his new friends to invite him to happy hour!

name: Milo
description_html:
Howdy folks!

I'm new here and just finishing getting my immune system bolstered so I can stay healthy. I can't wait to make new friends and meet you and find my new home.

Till then, Love, Milo

name: Gypsy
description_html:
A family lifestyle with dogs, cats and 2 children suited Gypsy beautifully.

As a cultured lady she knows her manners, her sit, stay, and she walks nicely on a leash and is house trained.

Her favorite things? Cuddles, walks, play and all things affectionate and loving

Gypsy is vaccinated, microchipped, heart worm negative, and spayed and although large, she's a shorter stature and has room to drop a few pounds

See her short video of when she was getting familiar with the shelter.

Gypsy is going to make a lucky family very happy.

She's advocated for by ClassicCaninesATX who provide an extra layer of tailored support for the mature dogs. Use her link to reach to reach out for questions or a meet up.

name: Olive Oyl
description_html: Winnie is super affectionate! She loves to get pets and snuggles. You may notice some fur missing. We found out that she was living in an area with cars in various stages of repair, and this girl got herself into an oil puddle. So, she has worked diligently to groom herself and in the process removed her own fur. Winnie could use some TLC and a healthy diet to get her back on track to the beauty she is meant to be. Adopt this angel today and you will be rewarded so much gratitude!

name: Juicebox
description_html: Since fostering this cutie, we have been working with her on learning the name Myla as she did not really respond to Jukebox. Only time will tell if she'll respond to the other name. She has gotten so used to our home in such little time, she is already house trained and *knock on wood* has had had zero accidents the past few days. She's so playful and fun loving. She is comfortable around other dogs and young children. Will update in the weeks to come as we learn more about her! Please help us find her furever home.

name: Evie
description_html:
Evey is a confident, cuddly puppy who radiates joy. Her adorably big ears, beautiful hazel eyes, & ever-wagging tail, combined with her happy demeaner make her incredibly charming.


Through the guidance of her two canine foster siblings, she is learning basic dog etiquette and is remarkably open to training. Her burning desire to befriend the household cat has met with resistance from said cat, but she makes herself as small as possible in his presence, and I believe she will eventually win him over.


Evey is crate-trained, sits for treats & meals, and is happy to follow whatever the group is doing. She is working on potty training and walking on a leash without getting distracted. She is eager to spend time with people & other dogs, and reads social cues well.


She is affectionate, happily flopping into the arms of anyone willing, and is about the best couch nap partner you could find. The game she likes best so far is chasing water sprayed from the hose - which happens to be a very low effort means of tiring her out and watering the yard simultaneously.


Evey is a baby, so she will still need some patience, training, and supervision, but the rewards of having such a smart, sweet dog in your life will make it all worthwhile.

name: Inspector Tater Tot
description_html: Inspector Tater Tot was living at a RV park and camp site for the past several years. He is definitely used to his freedom and may enjoy an indoor/outdoor or catio lifestyle. He's curious, calm and enjoys pets in moderation. When he's not solving crimes, like the infamous case of the missing Churu, he enjoys lounging, eating snacks, birding, and nature walks. Inspector has completed his latest investigation into campsite living, and is now ready to explore home options!

name: Kevin
description_html: Kevin was surrendered due to not doing well in a home with other cats. He loves people and would prefer not to share the attention! He's a cuddly guy who enjoys pets and snacks (as you can see), and will follow you around to make sure you don't get lonely. Kevin sometimes nips if he gets overstimulated, which can be easily managed in a home. Most of the time, he just wants to lounge around and be the center of attention. This big boy will be a loving, loyal companion to the lucky family who adopts him!

name: Cinnamon
description_html: Cinnamon was abandoned at a rescue and then brought to us for care. She was shy at first, but now she's showing us her active, playful side and telling us she's done with kennel life! This girl is ready to do zoomies around a home. Cinnamon loves Churu, so that may be the best way to make introductions. She enjoys pets and once she's in a calm home setting, we think that's when she will truly blossom! So add some spice to your life and adopt Cinnamon today!

name: Zuli
description_html: Zuli is shy at first but warms up and loooooooves people. She is so sweet. She loves snuggles, head and butt scratches, and belly rubs. She likes to play but is a chill energy for just a year old. She is great with other dogs, small and big kids.

name: Pixie
description_html:
Hi there! I’m Pixie, a sweet little girl with a heart of gold. I’m a young pup, full of energy and love to brighten your day with my playful spirit. I’m super friendly and always eager to meet new people, so if you're looking for a cuddle buddy or a lively playmate, I’m your girl!


I have a charming bark and enjoy expressing myself—it’s just part of my personality! After a fun day of play, there’s nothing I love more than curling up next to you for some quality snuggle time. I’ve been great about my potty training and have been going outside to do my business.


I get along wonderfully with my other small dogs in my foster home. I haven’t been seen interacting with large dogs or many other pups so I might still need to see how I do with them.


If you’re ready to welcome a loving companion who will bring joy and laughter into your life, I can’t wait to meet you!

name: Mickey
description_html: Mickey is the sweetest, most playful little guy! Don’t let his short legs fool you, he’s a pro at fetch and loves long walks. While he still has some puppy playfulness in him, this guy is smart and confident- he knows sit, down, stay, shake and is quickly picking up other commands. He might be a a genetic mystery but he definitely has a bit of working dog in him and is eager to please his human. He will do anything you ask him to for treats! He loves playing and zooming around, but he’s also down to curl up on the couch or be perfectly content people watching out the window. Good for bath time, in the crate, and in the car, just an all around good boy!

name: Leo
description_html: Meet Leo! Leo came to the shelter in mid March after being abandoned by his person. He was very skinny when we first met Leo. A friendly staffer let him spend a few days in their office resting and gaining weight. “Leo spent a few days in my office and is a really smart guy that knows lots of tricks. He knows sit, paw, sit/stay, down.” Sweet Leo is stressed in his kennel and needs human companionship to recover from his abandonment. Can you be the kind person to change Leo’s life? Come meet this handsome boy.

name: Sassy Girl
description_html:
Sassy Girl entered the shelter system when her owner could no longer care for her. We've found her to be a very friendly lady while she's housed in a crate waiting for life's next adventure.

She's very house trained and quiet in her crate.

In the play yard she likes to treat the swimming pool as her giant water bowl, drinking fresh water but never dipping her toes in.

She's easy to walk and easy to love and we encourage you to meet her and fall in love.

She's spayed and heart worm negative and ready to leave right away for a loving and safe indoors opportunity.

name: Boo
description_html: Boo showed up as a stray in the community and was brought to the shelter when their foster could no longer care for them. She did well with older, calmer dogs in her temporary home. Boo is a smart girl who knows "sit" & "come", and she's friendly with people even on first meetings. She's very much a "people lover" and just wants to be close to her special humans. Her cute, playful side also comes out and she enjoys romping around with her squeaky toys. The only thing Boo is afraid of is not getting into a home ASAP!

name: Clove
description_html: Clove's hobbies are chasing lizards, keeping up with what the squirrels are doing, and exploring his world one sniff at a time. He is still working on his leash skills during those times when his hobbies distract him. Clove enjoys a cuddle once he gets to know you, so we encourage you to get to know this unique boy!

name: Howard Butts
description_html:
Meet Howard E Butts.  Howard was found roaming around the local Dollar Tree.  Unfortunately, Howard's bank account was empty, but he found a nice lady that lured him to the car with cold sausages. As his name implies, he is a true Texan, and a true lover of ALL groceries. 


Howard has been enjoying time with his foster brothers Jonah (a human) and George Bailey (a dog that thinks he’s human.)  He loves walks in the hood, and a couch cuddle right after.  He knows what “go potty,” “sit,” “bedtime,” “dinner,” and “treat,” all mean… and he doesn’t miss a meal. 


Howard loves people, and dogs.  He loves sharing water and toys, but prefers dinner alone.  He is fast, but is easily recalled. Howard loves getting a little alone time, sleeping in his crate at night. His foster mom and dad love snuggling him, and would love to see him go to a home where he gets outdoor time, snuggles, and maybe has a sibling or two, though he also would be cool with alone time.

name: Spike
description_html:
Spike is the definition of a loyal, loving companion. If you’re looking for a dog who will happily curl up right next to you on the couch and soak up all the pets and affection, Spike is your guy. He absolutely loves being close to his people and has a calm, comforting presence that makes him the perfect best friend.


He’s currently working on leash training and doing great—each day he’s growing more confident and walking better. While he can be a little shy at first, Spike is adjusting quickly in his foster home and just needs a little patience and love to fully shine.


Spike has been doing an excellent job with pottying outside and is building great habits. He also has a healthy, enthusiastic appetite—mealtime is one of his favorite parts of the day!


His energy level is just right: not too hyper, not too lazy. He enjoys some activity but is just as happy relaxing and hanging out with you.


If you’re looking for a sweet, affectionate dog who will be your shadow and your snuggle partner, Spike is ready to meet you and steal your heart.

name: Niles
description_html:
Niles is a tiny little boy, even smaller than his sister. He loves to sleep on top of you, purr when he's hungry, and plays with his sister all the time. He's definitely a little lover boy.


He has no problem sleeping away all night long, and is litter trained.


He seems very comfortable around dogs *and* cats. He would be a great addition for anyone.

name: Daphne
description_html:
Daphne is a tiny girl, but slightly bigger than her brother. She *loves* to play, and is so cute zooming around. She loves nothing more than to play with her brother, but also with you before she falls asleep on/around you. 


She is litter trained, and has no problems just sleeping all night long.


She is comfortable around dogs *and* cats, and is always just the most playful. She would be a great addition for anyone.

name: Sven
description_html:
Sven showed up at the shelter as a stray, but nothing about him feels forgotten. He stepped confidently out of his carrier at intake, greeting staff with easy trust and allowing a microchip scan without hesitation—though none was found. It’s clear, though, that this boy has known love.


Sven is the kind of cat who makes fast friends. He’s affectionate without being demanding, happy to soak up attention and just as good at letting you know when he’s had his fill. There’s a quiet confidence about him, the kind that makes him feel instantly familiar—like he’s always belonged right by your side.


And honestly, one look at him says it all—Sven has the striking good looks of a cat who could easily be in front of a camera instead of behind kennel bars.

He’s ready to leave the shelter behind and step into a home where he can be admired, loved, and completely himself. Come meet Sven today—you might just wonder how you ever lived without him.

name: Baby Girl
description_html:
Meet Baby Girl — a sweet, goofy girl with a playful spirit and a heart full of love. She’s dog-friendly, crate trained, and house trained, making her a wonderful companion for a variety of homes. Baby Girl loves to play, cuddle, and soak up affection — she truly loves love.

She may take a minute to warm up to new people, but once she does, she’ll be your biggest fan, showering you with loyalty and affection. In her previous home, she lived with a smaller dog and absolutely loved having a buddy to play with.

Baby Girl’s past wasn’t always kind — she was left outside alone for long periods until a caring neighbor stepped in to help her. Despite that, she’s remained gentle, loving, and full of joy. Now, she’s ready for a forever home where she can feel safe, cherished, and included.

If you’re looking for a cuddly, playful companion who will blossom into a devoted best friend, Baby Girl might just be your perfect match.

name: Lupito
description_html: Lupito & Lulu came in together when their owner had to suddenly leave the county. They are mild mannered and enjoy pets. Lupito has the softest fur you can imagine and extra toe floof! He's affectionate and laid back. These boys are easy to love and they just need a soft place to land for the next leg of their journey. They can be adopted together or separately and seem to get along well with other cats.

name: Mumzy
description_html: Mumzy is a petite outgoing girl who loves to play with toys and get all your attention! She loves company and will gladly follow you around to make sure you don't get lonely either. Her favorite snack is chicken and her favorite activity is birding. Mumzy is bored of kennel life and would prefer to run free in a home today!

name: Charlie
description_html:
Isn't he a darling handsome grand boy? His large presence yet easy going manner will bring a sense of calm to your home. See his short video here.

He's very housetrained, nice to walk on a leash (but watch out lizards and squirrels!), he's happy to play a short game of fetch. He prefers to not have to eat alone and loves a view to the outside world.

Ask for help getting him out to meet him.

He can have a meet up with a dog from home by scheduling that with staff.

Charlie is advocated for by his friends at ClassicCaninesATX - onsite please see staff and if you have questions offsite feel free to reach out to caring@classiccanines.org

name: Lil Luna
description_html:
Hi there! I’m Lil Luna — a pocket-sized bundle of love with a heart way bigger than my paws. 🌙✨

I may be little, but my personality is larger than life! I’m sweet, playful, and always ready to make you smile with my goofy antics and happy wiggles. Whether I’m zooming around the yard, snuggling up beside you, or giving you my big soulful eyes, I know how to make every moment brighter.

I can be a little shy when meeting new people, but give me a little patience and kindness, and I’ll quickly become your loyal shadow and best friend. Once I trust you, I’m all about cuddles, kisses, and soaking up every bit of love I can get.

I dream of a forever home where I can feel safe, cherished, and part of the family. In return, I promise endless affection, laughter, and unconditional love.

Could you be the happily-ever-after my little heart has been waiting for? 🐾💕

name: Jina
description_html: Jina is a playful and cuddly pup! She’s already mastered being crate trained and is working towards being fully house broken. She gets along with other dogs, walks well on a leash and is a quiet, calm girl who would make a wonderful addition to any family!

name: Charlotte
description_html:
Charlotte is a sweet, loving pup who gives her whole heart to the people she meets. It doesn’t take long for her to decide you’re her new best friend—she’s that kind of dog.

She’s incredibly social and does great with both humans and other dogs, making her an easy addition to many homes. Whether she’s meeting new friends or hanging out with her people, Charlotte is always happy to be part of the moment.

One of her favorite things? Car rides! She’s a calm and easy passenger who will happily curl up in the back seat and enjoy a peaceful nap while you drive.

Charlotte is also a big fan of treats and takes them ever so gently—just another sign of her sweet and easygoing nature.

If you’re looking for a loyal companion who’s affectionate, friendly, and ready to love you from day one, Charlotte might just be your perfect match. .

name: Annie
description_html:
ALERT!! ALERT!!

This sweet tiny lady of less than 40lbs really needs an outstretched hand to guide her to a loving home where we can help her continue the journey to medical wellness. She deserves this. She absolutely adores peoples and seems at ease around dogs (we've not seen her by cats).

Her advocacy group Classic Canines is able to provide the support for an adopter or foster to work through her treatment plan.


Will you be the one to speak up for her and help her reach her best life waiting ahead?


Reach out to staff onsite or reach out to caring@classiccanines.org to learn more.

name: Beastie
description_html: Beastie is tired of being stuck in this kennel all day long! This wild child needs to let loose, run and play. He's an active boy that loves to play with wand toys and chase toy mice. Can you help him enjoy his freedom once again? Adopt Beastie today and have entertainment built into your daily life.

name: Ava
description_html:
Sweet Ava has been very calm and polite during her stay.

She's also a nice lady on a leash for her walks.

She's at one with mother nature and simply watches the birds without intruding upon them.

We notice she isn't much into toys but if you get to her level soon she'll be giving kisses.

Ava is currently sharing a kennel with another dog for company.

We invite you stop by and meet her.

name: Beef Wellington
description_html:
Beef Wellington is as joyful as his name!

This pup has so much love to give and is always happy to be around new friends.

He walks beautifully on a leash, staying calmly by your side, and knows how to sit patiently for treats.

He also shares his kennel well with another pup.

With a medium energy level, he loves to chase toys—even if retrieving them isn’t his specialty yet.

Come meet Beef Wellington—you won’t be able to resist his charm!

name: Jessie
description_html: Jessie is a shy girl that loves pets! She may not be outgoing in the shelter but we imagine she will relax quickly in a home. Jessie will raise her little butt when you pet her and she purrs to show her contentment. This demure girl is waiting for a calm place to unwind and a lap to lounge in. We've added her to our Cactus Cat room so she can have feline companionship to help her come out of her shell. Adopt this precious lady today!

name: Coco
description_html:
Coco has seven other siblings, please consider adopting in pairs (if you can). Kittens from Tira's litter will be available in early June (spay/neuter surgery is scheduled in late May).


Key Benefits of Adopting Pairs:

  • Faster Socialization: Kittens learn "how to cat" by observing each other, picking up skills like using the litter box and proper grooming more quickly.
  • Bite Inhibition: Through wrestling and play, littermates teach each other boundaries. When a sibling cries or swats back, they learn how hard is too hard to bite or scratch, reducing aggression toward humans.
  • Reduced Boredom and Mischief: A single bored kitten is more likely to engage in destructive behaviors like climbing curtains or chewing plants. Pairs channel that energy into play with one another.
  • Easier Transitions: Moving to a new home is stressful. Having a familiar sibling provides immediate comfort, helping kittens settle in faster and explore more confidently.
  • Better Senior Cat Harmony: If you already have an older cat, two kittens will pester each other rather than overwhelming the senior cat with their high energy.

name: Starflight (24763)
description_html: Starflight is a sweetie that loves food, pets, and playing with the jingle ball.

name: Sunny (24765)
description_html: Sunny was the smallest of the litter, but a fan favorite. He is spunky and sweet.

name: Tsunami (24761)
description_html: Tsunami is a social girl who likes to be in your business. She is vocal, loves a snuggle, and often the first of the 5 littermates to greet you.

name: Tira
description_html:
Tira (short for Tiramisu) is currently nursing 8 kittens born in late March. She is available for adoption after she is no longer nursing and/or when her kittens are adopted (as well as other requirements as part of AAC policy such as spay/neuter and microchipped).


Tira is really sweet, gentle, and very sincere. She will feed her kittens immediately after taking a few bites of her wet food and will finish her food once she is done nursing.


Tira is only 9-months old and was a community cat before I brought her inside.

name: Glory (24764)
description_html: Glory is a little, fluffy girl who is full of personality. She likes to talk and play.

name: Clay (24762)
description_html: Clay is a lover. He is the quickest of the litter to purr, the least nervous about new visitors, and an overall good boy.

name: Gage
description_html:
Gage has a heart as big as his paws! ❤️

He is still figuring out the world, so he can come across a little shy and unsure. It doesn’t take him long to feel safe, and he will cuddle up as close as he can!

He is young, curious, and so eager to please everyone. His calm nature can easily fit in with any home environment. 

Stop by to meet Gage—you just might fall in love with his sweet and gentle personality.

name: Mera
description_html: Mera is a wallflower at the shelter. She won't sing her own praises, but she's a lovely, endearing girl. Mera will lean into pets and loves affection. We would love to see her blossom in a home ASAP so that she doesn't have to hide her wonderful qualities anymore.

name: Chantilly
description_html:
Chantilly has seven other siblings, please consider adopting in pairs (if you can). Kittens from Tira's litter will be available in early June (spay/neuter surgery is scheduled in late May).


Key Benefits of Adopting Pairs:

  • Faster Socialization: Kittens learn "how to cat" by observing each other, picking up skills like using the litter box and proper grooming more quickly.
  • Bite Inhibition: Through wrestling and play, littermates teach each other boundaries. When a sibling cries or swats back, they learn how hard is too hard to bite or scratch, reducing aggression toward humans.
  • Reduced Boredom and Mischief: A single bored kitten is more likely to engage in destructive behaviors like climbing curtains or chewing plants. Pairs channel that energy into play with one another.
  • Easier Transitions: Moving to a new home is stressful. Having a familiar sibling provides immediate comfort, helping kittens settle in faster and explore more confidently.
  • Better Senior Cat Harmony: If you already have an older cat, two kittens will pester each other rather than overwhelming the senior cat with their high energy.

name: Polly
description_html:
Polly’s story starts the way many do—found as a stray—but everything about her suggests she’s meant for something softer than shelter life. From the moment she arrived, she’s met staff with gentle trust, even welcoming attention from the vet team during her vaccinations.


Despite the noise and constant change around her, Polly hasn’t lost her calm, affectionate nature. She leans into pets, clearly enjoying the connection, and carries herself with an easy sweetness that’s hard to miss. Add in her excellent litter box habits, and she’s as easy to care for as she is to loved.


It’s a bit of a mystery why she’s still here. Polly feels like the kind of cat who should already be curled up in someone’s home, not waiting behind a kennel door. If you’re looking for a companion who will quietly steal your heart, Polly is ready to meet you.

name: Furrball Mcgraw
description_html: Furrball McGraw is one furry boy you will want to pamper! He's had a tough life outdoors, but this friendly boy is ready for a little luxury in his life. He loves to get pets and affection just as much as he appreciates a good snack. Furrball is a buddy for life! His loyalty to whoever invites him into their heart will last forever.

name: Duke
description_html: Duke is an outdoorsman. He is your best buddy for hikes and walks through nature! This friendly, laid back guy has enjoyed the company of kids, cats and other dogs. He's very good natured, calm and easy to walk on leash. Duke also appreciates a good swim, so don't forget to take him to your favorite river or spring to splash around. He's ready for his next adventure today!

name: Tyson
description_html:
Here's one friendly good ole' boy with people, dogs and even outdoor cats..

He'll won't even destroy toys and balls left around by the kids or other dogs. His thing is exploring and he has plenty of spirit and pep for walks, hikes, and conducting recognizance in his yard space. He'll be keeping an ear up waiting for you to come by to meet him. Till then.

name: Meows
description_html: Meows made her way to the shelter after an eviction. She is initially shy in the shelter but she absolutely adores pets and gets a lot of comfort from them! We don't think it will take long for her to adapt in a calm home with loving, patient adopters to guide her. This affectionate girl is ready for a new chapter in a home today!

name: Sunniva
description_html:
Hello....my friends at the shelter gave me the name "Sunniva" because of the beautiful stars on my leather collar that my people gave me...but now I can't find my people and that makes me sad.

I'm a very nice lady and I remember everyone I meet. I walk nice on a leash, I'm not crazy tennis ball obsessed, instead I like dipping my toes in the pool when I can. I like to play a funny game with squirrels like I'm going to catch them, but then I stop and leave them alone because we're all creatures of the earth and need to get along, right? I'm sharing my kennel with another dog friend for company.

You can come see me anytime. I hope you will. Till then.

name: Velvet
description_html: Don't trust Velvet's grouch face. She can't help it and she doesn't mean it. Velvet loves pets and appreciates attention. She's affectionate without being needy. Velvet is very well balanced! Adopt this soft, easy going girl today!

name: Stout
description_html:
Meet puppy Stout!

She is a beautiful, SMART, and playful young puppy. She LOVES kids/kid-friendly! She also loves to play with other dogs and quickly recognizes when some (particularly small breeds) require space. She gets along amazingly with my 11-year-old black lab, who's helping show her all the important doggy etiquette. She is truly a quick study! She knows ball and fetch and, while working through her teething stage, loves a good chew toy or stuffie. Enjoying a belly rub while relaxing is a quick way to fall in love.

She is already crate-trained and learning and excelling at all her basic commands + potty training. She loves to snuggle up at night or during nap time, but sleeps 10p-7a without issue in the crate.


Stout is microchipped, has received her first rounds of shots, and is set to be spayed 5/14 along with her second round of shots.


I can already tell what a wonderful companion this girl will be <3


I do believe she has some working blood in her; she has been very well-mannered and would love a family to keep her busy or a lifelong companion to call her bestie.

name: Kirby
description_html: With just a little encouragement, Kirby comes out of hiding and loves to get pets. He's a scaredy boy at first, but that's just because this is a new place for him. He was abandoned at someone's residence, so we don't know his history, but we do know he is used to getting love and he misses it! This affectionate, shy boy could use a calm place to relax and feel safe and secure. Kirby is ready for adoption now!
